---
title: "Projection à 20 ans sans déversement et avec hypothèses sur évolution des débits"
author: "Marion Legrand & Etienne Prévost"
date: "2023-09-01"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged

---

```{r consignes, eval=FALSE,echo=FALSE}
# Consignes pour l'exécution du script

Le script doit être lancé à la main (chunk après chunk) depuis le chunk "init".
2 choix sont à faire :
  1_ le type de modèle : inclue ou non le modèle de distribution de mélange à Vichy
  2_ le scénario d''évolution des débits : "sans_Q" / "identique" / "diminu_5" / "diminue_10"

Une fois que init et charge_data sont lancés, on peut faire un save.image qu''on pourra recharger dans le chunck "init_quick" pour gagner du temps.

Pour faire fonctionner le script il faut lancer les chunk "init" (c''est là qu''on pourra faire le choix entre modèle de mélange ou non), "charge data", puis choisir son scénario dans le chunck "scenario_Q", à la suite de quoi on peut lancer "model_avec_distri_melange" (si on travaille sur ce modèle) ou "model_sans_distri_melange" qui réalise tous les calculs pour les 20 ans de projection puis le chunk "save_calcul" (ou "save_calcul_ss_distri_melange") pour sauver les jeux de données et "graph_proj_20yr" (ou "graph_proj_20yr_ss_distri_melange") pour sauvegarder les graphs des retours à Vichy sur les 20 ans de projection.
Une fois tout cela fait pour les différents scénarios de débits souhaité (il faut refaire toutes ces étapes pour chacun des scénarios) et pour les différents types de modèle, on peut kniter le document pour générer le fichier html.
```

```{r setup, eval=TRUE,echo=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE,warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir=here::here("img/Simulation/2023_05/"))
```

```{r init_quick, eval=TRUE,echo=FALSE}

library(coda)
library(faraway) #pour fonction ilogit()
library(boot)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(Rlab) #pour fonction rbern

#......................................
# Modèle avec distribution de mélange
#......................................
load(file=here::here("2023_09_01_Projection_sensibilite_evolution_Q_init_ModelMelange.Rdata"))

#......................................
# Modèle sans distribution de mélange
#......................................
load(file=here::here("2023_09_01_Projection_sensibilite_evolution_Q_init_WithoutModelMelange.Rdata"))
```

```{r init, eval=FALSE,echo=FALSE}

type_mod<-"WithoutModelMelange" #"ModelMelange" / "WithoutModelMelange"

if(type_mod=="ModelMelange"){
  datawd<-here::here("data/CODA/2023_05/2_Model_melange_homogenisation_Q_printemps/")
  imgwd<-here::here("img/Simulation/2023_05/")
  tabwd<-here::here("tab/2023_05/2_Model_melange_homogenisation_Q_printemps/")
}
if(type_mod=="WithoutModelMelange"){
  datawd<-here::here("data/CODA/2023_05/3_Model_sans_distribution_melange/")
  imgwd<-here::here("img/Simulation/2023_05/")
  tabwd<-here::here("tab/2023_05/3_Model_sans_distribution_melange/")
}

library(coda)
library(faraway) #pour fonction ilogit()
library(boot)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(Rlab) #pour fonction rbern
T=48

source(here::here("script/fonctions/fct_graph.R"))
source(here::here("script/fonctions/fct_data.R"))
#-- Appel à la fonction du script "fct_data.R" pour récupérer les surfaces productives
S_juv_JP<-keep_good_surf(surf_2021=TRUE)
```


```{r charge_data,echo=FALSE,include=FALSE,eval=TRUE}
#On choisit le nbr d'itération qu'on veut conserver
iteration=10000

#..................................................................................
# Récupération des paramètres dans le posterior joint
#..................................................................................
bugs_ratio_juv_prod_L=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"simulation/ratio_juv_prod_LCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"simulation/ratio_juv_prod_LCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_rho_station=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"rho_stationCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"rho_stationCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_adjust_p_A=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"simulation/adjust_p_ACODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"simulation/adjust_p_ACODAindex.txt"))
bugs_adjust_p_L=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"simulation/adjust_p_LCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"simulation/adjust_p_LCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_adjust_p_P=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"simulation/adjust_p_PCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"simulation/adjust_p_PCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_sigma_p_alagnon=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"sigma_p_alagnonCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"sigma_p_alagnonCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_sigma_p_langeac=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"sigma_p_langeacCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"sigma_p_langeacCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_sigma_p_poutes=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"sigma_p_poutesCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"sigma_p_poutesCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_sigma_vichy=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"sigma_vichyCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"sigma_vichyCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_sigma_wild_moy=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"parameters/sigma_wild_moyCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"parameters/sigma_wild_moyCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_sigma_juv_moy=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"parameters/sigma_juv_moyCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"parameters/sigma_juv_moyCODAindex.txt"))
#bugs_I_surv=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"simulation/I_survCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"simulation/I_survCODAindex.txt"))
#bugs_level_s=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"simulation/level_sCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"simulation/level_sCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_s_juv2ad=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"simulation/s_juv2adCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"simulation/s_juv2adCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_alpha_dd=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"simulation/alpha_ddCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"simulation/alpha_ddCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_beta_dd=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"simulation/beta_ddCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"simulation/beta_ddCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_a_juv=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"a_juvCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"a_juvCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_a=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"aCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"aCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_a=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"aCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"aCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_Rmax=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"RmaxCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"RmaxCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_res_wild_vichy=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"simulation/res_wild_vichyCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"simulation/res_wild_vichyCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_res_wild_alagnon=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"simulation/res_wild_alagnonCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"simulation/res_wild_alagnonCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_res_wild_langeac=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"simulation/res_wild_langeacCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"simulation/res_wild_langeacCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_res_wild_poutes=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"simulation/res_wild_poutesCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"simulation/res_wild_poutesCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_dmoy_tot_V=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"dmoytot_VCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"dmoytot_VCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_dmoy_tot_A=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"dmoytot_ACODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"dmoytot_ACODAindex.txt"))
bugs_dmoy_tot_L=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"dmoytot_LCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"dmoytot_LCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_dmoy_tot_P=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"dmoytot_PCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"dmoytot_PCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_res_wild_vichy=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"res_wild_VCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"res_wild_VCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_res_wild_alagnon=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"res_wild_ACODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"res_wild_ACODAindex.txt"))
bugs_res_wild_langeac=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"res_wild_LCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"res_wild_LCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_res_wild_poutes=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"res_wild_PCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"res_wild_PCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_nu_d=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"nu_dCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"nu_dCODAindex.txt"))

bugs_beta_Q_VB_deval=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"beta_Q_VB_devalCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"beta_Q_VB_devalCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_beta_Q_MSL_deval=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"beta_Q_MSL_devalCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"beta_Q_MSL_devalCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_beta_Q_MSL_mont=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"beta_Q_MSL_montCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"beta_Q_MSL_montCODAindex.txt"))

bugs_beta_Q_VB_mont_P=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"beta_Q_VB_mont_PCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"beta_Q_VB_mont_PCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_beta_Q_VB_mont_A=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"beta_Q_VB_mont_ACODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"beta_Q_VB_mont_ACODAindex.txt"))
bugs_beta_Q_L_mont_P=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"beta_Q_L_mont_PCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"beta_Q_L_mont_PCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_beta_Q_L_mont_A=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"beta_Q_L_mont_ACODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"beta_Q_L_mont_ACODAindex.txt"))
bugs_beta_Q_P_mont_P=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"beta_Q_P_mont_PCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"beta_Q_P_mont_PCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_beta_Q_P_mont_A=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"beta_Q_P_mont_ACODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"beta_Q_P_mont_ACODAindex.txt"))

source(str_c(datawd,"data.R"))

#On renomme les données récupérées de bugs pour pas qu'il y ait de confusion plus loin
bugs_Q_VB_mont_P<-Q_VB_mont_P
rm(Q_VB_mont_P)
bugs_Q_VB_mont_A<-Q_VB_mont_A
rm(Q_VB_mont_A)
bugs_Q_L_mont_P<-Q_L_mont_P
rm(Q_L_mont_P)
bugs_Q_L_mont_A<-Q_L_mont_A
rm(Q_L_mont_A)
bugs_Q_P_mont_P<-Q_P_mont_P
rm(Q_P_mont_P)
bugs_Q_P_mont_A<-Q_P_mont_A
rm(Q_P_mont_A)

bugs_Q_VB_deval<-Q_VB_deval
rm(Q_VB_deval)
bugs_Q_MSL_mont<-Q_MSL_mont
rm(Q_MSL_mont)
bugs_Q_MSL_deval<-Q_MSL_deval
rm(Q_MSL_deval)

#on recalcul les débits centrés-réduits qu'on a utilisé dans openbugs
bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P<-array(0,dim=T)
bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A<-array(0,dim=T)
bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P<-array(0,dim=T)
bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A<-array(0,dim=T)
bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P<-array(0,dim=T)
bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A<-array(0,dim=T)

bugs_L_Q_VB_deval<-array(0,dim=T)
bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont<-array(0,dim=T)
bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval<-array(0,dim=T)

bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_cr<-array(0,dim=T)
bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_cr<-array(0,dim=T)
bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P_cr<-array(0,dim=T)
bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_cr<-array(0,dim=T)
bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_cr<-array(0,dim=T)
bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_cr<-array(0,dim=T)

bugs_L_Q_VB_deval_cr<-array(0,dim=T)
bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont_cr<-array(0,dim=T)
bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval_cr<-array(0,dim=T)


for (t in 1:T){
  bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P[t]<-log(bugs_Q_VB_mont_P[t])
  bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_cr[t]<-(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P[t]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P)
  bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A[t]<-log(bugs_Q_VB_mont_A[t])
  bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_cr[t]<-(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A[t]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A)
  bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P[t]<-log(bugs_Q_L_mont_P[t])
  bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_cr[t]<-(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P[t]-mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P)
  bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A[t]<-log(bugs_Q_L_mont_A[t])
  bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_cr[t]<-(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A[t]-mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A)
  bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P[t]<-log(bugs_Q_P_mont_P[t])
  bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_cr[t]<-(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P[t]-mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P)
  bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A[t]<-log(bugs_Q_P_mont_A[t])
  bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_cr[t]<-(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A[t]-mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A)
  
  bugs_L_Q_VB_deval[t]<-log(bugs_Q_VB_deval[t])
  bugs_L_Q_VB_deval_cr[t]<-(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval[t]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval)
  bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont[t]<-log(bugs_Q_MSL_mont[t])
  bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont_cr[t]<-(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont[t]-mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont))/sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont)
  bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval[t]<-log(bugs_Q_MSL_deval[t])
  bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval_cr[t]<-(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval[t]-mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval))/sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval)
  }

Qvb_deval<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+20))
Qmsl_mont<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+20))
Qmsl_deval<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+20))

s_juv2ad_20yr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+20))
L_s_juv2ad_20yr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+20))

save.image(file=str_c(here::here("2023_09_01_Projection_sensibilite_evolution_Q_init_"),type_mod,".Rdata"))

```

Pour commencer à regarder la sensibilité du modèle aux hypothèses d'évolution des débits, on réalise des projections à 20 ans sous 4 scénarios d'évolution des débits différents :
  
  * Projection à 20 ans sans influence des débits. Scénario nommé "sans_Q" : on fait tourner les projections sans prise en compte de l'influence des débits sur les 20 ans de projection. Ce scénario consiste à mettre tous les débits à 0 afin d'avoir un modèle "toute chose égale par ailleurs".


```{r détail_scenario_sans_q, echo=TRUE,eval=FALSE}
if(scenario=="sans_Q"){
    for (t in (T+1):(T+20)){
      for (i in 1:iteration){
        L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-0
        L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-0
        L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-0
        L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-0
        L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-0
        L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-0
        
        L_Q_VB_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]<-0
        L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr_cr[i,t]<-0
        L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]<-0
      }
    }
}
```

 * Les débits restent les mêmes sur la période de projection à 20 ans. Scénario nommé "identique" : durant les 20 ans de projection les débits sont suposés être les mêmes que ceux observés durant les 20 dernières années de la période rétrospective.


```{r détail_scenario_identique, echo=TRUE,eval=FALSE}

if(scenario=="identique"){
  for(t in 1:20){
    for (i in 1:iteration){
      #Débit montaison Lempdes sur Alagnon
      L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr))
    
      #Débit montaison à Vieille-Brioude (secteur Langeac-Poutès)
      L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr))
   
      #Débit montaison à Prades (secteur amont Poutès)
      L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr))
      
       #Influence des débits sur la survie
      L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr))
      L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval_20yr))
  
    }
  }
   #Attention on centre-réduit en utilisant les données historiques de bugs car on veut bien mettre toute la série (retrospective et projection) sur la même "échelle" 
  for (t in (T+1):(T+20)){
     for (i in 1:iteration){
        L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P)
        L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A)
        L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P)
        L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A)
        L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P)
        L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A)
        
        L_Q_VB_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval)
        L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont))/sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont)
        L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval))/sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval)
     }
  }
}
```

avec "bugs_Q_L_mont_P_20yr"/"bugs_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr"/"bugs_Q_P_mont_P_20yr", etc. les débits utilisés dans bugs mais qu'on limite au 20 dernières années de la période rétrospective


 * Les débits diminuent de 5% par rapport aux débits moyens des 20 dernières années (variance identique). Scénario nommé "diminue_5" : durant les 20 ans de projection les débits sont suposés être en diminution de 5% de ce qui était observé durant les 20 dernières années de la périodes rétrospectives.



```{r détail_scenario_diminue5, echo=TRUE,eval=FALSE}

if(scenario=="diminue_5"){
   for(t in 1:20){
    for (i in 1:iteration){
      #Débit montaison Lempdes sur Alagnon
      L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t] + log(0.95)
      L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr))
      L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t] + log(0.95)
      #Débit montaison à Vieille-Brioude (secteur Langeac-Poutès)
      L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t] + log(0.95)
      L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<- L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t] + log(0.95)
      #Débit montaison à Prades (secteur amont Poutès)
      L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t] + log(0.95)
      L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr))
      L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t] + log(0.95)
       #Influence des débits sur la survie
      L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr))
      L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t] + log(0.95)
      L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr))
      L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t] + log(0.95)
      L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t] + log(0.95)
  
    }
  }
   #Attention on centre-réduit en utilisant les données historiques de bugs car on veut bien mettre toute la série (retrospective et projection) sur la même "échelle" 
  for (t in (T+1):(T+20)){
     for (i in 1:iteration){
        L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P)
        L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A)
        L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P)
        L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A)
        L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P)
        L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A)
        
        L_Q_VB_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval)
        L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont))/sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont)
        L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval))/sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval)
     }
  }
}
```
avec "bugs_Q_L_mont_P_20yr"/"bugs_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr"/"bugs_Q_P_mont_P_20yr", etc. les débits utilisés dans bugs mais qu'on limite au 20 dernières années de la période rétrospective

 * Les débits diminuent de 10% par rapport aux débits moyens des 20 dernières années (variance identique). Scénario nommé "diminue_10" : durant les 20 ans de projection les débits sont suposés être en diminution de 10% de ce qui était observé durant les 20 dernières années de la périodes rétrospectives.
  
  
```{r détail_scenario_diminue10, echo=TRUE,eval=FALSE}
if(scenario=="diminue_10"){
   for(t in 1:20){
    for (i in 1:iteration){
      #Débit montaison Lempdes sur Alagnon
      L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t] + log(0.90)
      L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr))
      L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t] + log(0.90)
      #Débit montaison à Vieille-Brioude (secteur Langeac-Poutès)
      L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t] + log(0.90)
      L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<- L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t] + log(0.90)
      #Débit montaison à Prades (secteur amont Poutès)
      L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t] + log(0.90)
      L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr))
      L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t] + log(0.90)
       #Influence des débits sur la survie
      L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr))
      L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t] + log(0.90)
      L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr))
      L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t] + log(0.90)
      L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t] + log(0.90)
  
    }
  }
   #Attention on centre-réduit en utilisant les données historiques de bugs car on veut bien mettre toute la série (retrospective et projection) sur la même "échelle" 
  for (t in (T+1):(T+20)){
     for (i in 1:iteration){
        L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P)
        L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A)
        L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P)
        L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A)
        L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P)
        L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A)
        
        L_Q_VB_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval)
        L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont))/sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont)
        L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval))/sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval)
     }
  }
}
```
avec "bugs_Q_L_mont_P_20yr"/"bugs_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr"/"bugs_Q_P_mont_P_20yr", etc. les débits utilisés dans bugs mais qu'on limite au 20 dernières années de la période rétrospective

```{r détail_scenario_augmente5, echo=TRUE,eval=FALSE}
if(scenario=="augmente_5"){
   for(t in 1:20){
    for (i in 1:iteration){
      #Débit montaison Lempdes sur Alagnon
      L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t] + log(1.05)
      L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr))
      L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t] + log(1.05)
      #Débit montaison à Vieille-Brioude (secteur Langeac-Poutès)
      L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t] + log(1.05)
      L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<- L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t] + log(1.05)
      #Débit montaison à Prades (secteur amont Poutès)
      L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t] + log(1.05)
      L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr))
      L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t] + log(1.05)
       #Influence des débits sur la survie
      L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr))
      L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t] + log(1.05)
      L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr))
      L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t] + log(1.05)
      L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t] + log(1.05)
  
    }
  }
   #Attention on centre-réduit en utilisant les données historiques de bugs car on veut bien mettre toute la série (retrospective et projection) sur la même "échelle" 
  for (t in (T+1):(T+20)){
     for (i in 1:iteration){
        L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P)
        L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A)
        L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P)
        L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A)
        L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P)
        L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A)
        
        L_Q_VB_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval)
        L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont))/sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont)
        L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval))/sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval)
     }
  }
}
```
```{r détail_scenario_augmente10, echo=TRUE,eval=FALSE}
if(scenario=="augmente_10"){
   for(t in 1:20){
    for (i in 1:iteration){
      #Débit montaison Lempdes sur Alagnon
      L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t] + log(1.10)
      L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr))
      L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t] + log(1.10)
      #Débit montaison à Vieille-Brioude (secteur Langeac-Poutès)
      L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t] + log(1.10)
      L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<- L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t] + log(1.10)
      #Débit montaison à Prades (secteur amont Poutès)
      L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t] + log(1.10)
      L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr))
      L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t] + log(1.10)
       #Influence des débits sur la survie
      L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr))
      L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t] + log(1.10)
      L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr))
      L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t] + log(1.10)
      L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t] + log(1.10)
  
    }
  }
   #Attention on centre-réduit en utilisant les données historiques de bugs car on veut bien mettre toute la série (retrospective et projection) sur la même "échelle" 
  for (t in (T+1):(T+20)){
     for (i in 1:iteration){
        L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P)
        L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A)
        L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P)
        L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A)
        L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P)
        L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A)
        
        L_Q_VB_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval)
        L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont))/sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont)
        L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval))/sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval)
     }
  }
}
```

```{r scenario_Q, echo=FALSE, eval=TRUE}

#Choix du scénario
scenario = "augmente_10" #choisir dans "sans_Q" / "identique" / "diminue_5" / "diminue_10" / "augmente_5" / "augmente_10"

Q_L_mont_P_20yr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,20))
Q_L_mont_A_20yr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,20))
Q_VB_mont_P_20yr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,20))
Q_VB_mont_A_20yr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,20))
Q_P_mont_P_20yr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,20))
Q_P_mont_A_20yr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,20))
Q_VB_deval_20yr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,20))
Q_MSL_deval_20yr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,20))
Q_MSL_mont_20yr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,20))

L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,20))
L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,20))
L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,20))
L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,20))
L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,20))
L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,20))
L_Q_VB_deval_20yr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,20))
L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,20))
L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,20))

L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr_cr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+20))
L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr_cr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+20))
L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr_cr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+20))
L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr_cr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+20))
L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr_cr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+20))
L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr_cr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+20))
L_Q_VB_deval_20yr_cr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+20))
L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr_cr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+20))
L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr_cr<-array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+20))

#On utilise les données de bugs pour la moyenne et sd des distributions dans lesquelles on va venir tirer pour les données à utiliser pour les 20 ans de projection
bugs_Q_L_mont_P_20yr<-bugs_Q_L_mont_P[(T-19):T] #on ne calcule que sur les 20 dernières années de la série bugs
bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr<-log(bugs_Q_L_mont_P_20yr)
bugs_Q_L_mont_A_20yr<-bugs_Q_L_mont_A[(T-19):T]#on ne calcule que sur les 20 dernières années de la série bugs
bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr<-log(bugs_Q_L_mont_A_20yr)

bugs_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr<-bugs_Q_VB_mont_P[(T-19):T]#on ne calcule que sur les 20 dernières années de la série bugs
bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr<-log(bugs_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr)
bugs_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr<-bugs_Q_VB_mont_A[(T-19):T]#on ne calcule que sur les 20 dernières années de la série bugs
bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr<-log(bugs_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr)

bugs_Q_P_mont_P_20yr<-bugs_Q_P_mont_P[(T-19):T]#on ne calcule que sur les 20 dernières années de la série bugs
bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr<-log(bugs_Q_P_mont_P_20yr)
bugs_Q_P_mont_A_20yr<-bugs_Q_P_mont_A[(T-19):T]#on ne calcule que sur les 20 dernières années de la série bugs
bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr<-log(bugs_Q_P_mont_A_20yr)


bugs_Q_MSL_deval_20yr<-bugs_Q_MSL_deval[(T-19):T]#on ne calcule que sur les 20 dernières années de la série bugs
bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr<-log(bugs_Q_MSL_deval_20yr)

bugs_Q_MSL_mont_20yr<-bugs_Q_MSL_mont[(T-19):T]#on ne calcule que sur les 20 dernières années de la série bugs
bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr<-log(bugs_Q_MSL_mont_20yr)

bugs_Q_VB_deval_20yr<-bugs_Q_VB_deval[(T-19):T]#on ne calcule que sur les 20 dernières années de la série bugs
bugs_L_Q_VB_deval_20yr<-log(bugs_Q_VB_deval_20yr)

if(scenario=="sans_Q"){
    for (t in (T+1):(T+20)){
      for (i in 1:iteration){
        L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-0
        L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-0
        L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-0
        L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-0
        L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-0
        L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-0
        
        L_Q_VB_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]<-0
        L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr_cr[i,t]<-0
        L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]<-0
      }
    }
}

if(scenario=="identique"){
  for(t in 1:20){
    for (i in 1:iteration){
      #Débit montaison Lempdes sur Alagnon
      L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr))
    
      #Débit montaison à Vieille-Brioude (secteur Langeac-Poutès)
      L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr))
   
      #Débit montaison à Prades (secteur amont Poutès)
      L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr))
      
       #Influence des débits sur la survie
      L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr))
      L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval_20yr))
  
    }
  }
   #Attention on centre-réduit en utilisant les données historiques de bugs car on veut bien mettre toute la série (retrospective et projection) sur la même "échelle" 
  for (t in (T+1):(T+20)){
     for (i in 1:iteration){
        L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P)
        L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A)
        L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P)
        L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A)
        L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P)
        L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A)
        
        L_Q_VB_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval)
        L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont))/sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont)
        L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval))/sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval)
     }
  }
}

if(scenario=="diminue_5"){
   for(t in 1:20){
    for (i in 1:iteration){
      #Débit montaison Lempdes sur Alagnon
      L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t] + log(0.95)
      L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr))
      L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t] + log(0.95)
      #Débit montaison à Vieille-Brioude (secteur Langeac-Poutès)
      L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t] + log(0.95)
      L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<- L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t] + log(0.95)
      #Débit montaison à Prades (secteur amont Poutès)
      L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t] + log(0.95)
      L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr))
      L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t] + log(0.95)
       #Influence des débits sur la survie
      L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr))
      L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t] + log(0.95)
      L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr))
      L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t] + log(0.95)
      L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t] + log(0.95)
  
    }
  }
   #Attention on centre-réduit en utilisant les données historiques de bugs car on veut bien mettre toute la série (retrospective et projection) sur la même "échelle" 
  for (t in (T+1):(T+20)){
     for (i in 1:iteration){
        L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P)
        L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A)
        L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P)
        L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A)
        L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P)
        L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A)
        
        L_Q_VB_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval)
        L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont))/sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont)
        L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval))/sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval)
     }
  }
}

if(scenario=="diminue_10"){
   for(t in 1:20){
    for (i in 1:iteration){
      #Débit montaison Lempdes sur Alagnon
      L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t] + log(0.90)
      L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr))
      L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t] + log(0.90)
      #Débit montaison à Vieille-Brioude (secteur Langeac-Poutès)
      L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t] + log(0.90)
      L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<- L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t] + log(0.90)
      #Débit montaison à Prades (secteur amont Poutès)
      L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t] + log(0.90)
      L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr))
      L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t] + log(0.90)
       #Influence des débits sur la survie
      L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr))
      L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t] + log(0.90)
      L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr))
      L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t] + log(0.90)
      L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t] + log(0.90)
  
    }
  }
   #Attention on centre-réduit en utilisant les données historiques de bugs car on veut bien mettre toute la série (retrospective et projection) sur la même "échelle" 
  for (t in (T+1):(T+20)){
     for (i in 1:iteration){
        L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P)
        L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A)
        L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P)
        L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A)
        L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P)
        L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A)
        
        L_Q_VB_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval)
        L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont))/sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont)
        L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval))/sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval)
     }
  }
}

if(scenario=="augmente_5"){
   for(t in 1:20){
    for (i in 1:iteration){
      #Débit montaison Lempdes sur Alagnon
      L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t] + log(1.05)
      L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr))
      L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t] + log(1.05)
      #Débit montaison à Vieille-Brioude (secteur Langeac-Poutès)
      L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t] + log(1.05)
      L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<- L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t] + log(1.05)
      #Débit montaison à Prades (secteur amont Poutès)
      L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t] + log(1.05)
      L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr))
      L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t] + log(1.05)
       #Influence des débits sur la survie
      L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr))
      L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t] + log(1.05)
      L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr))
      L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t] + log(1.05)
      L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t] + log(1.05)
  
    }
  }
   #Attention on centre-réduit en utilisant les données historiques de bugs car on veut bien mettre toute la série (retrospective et projection) sur la même "échelle" 
  for (t in (T+1):(T+20)){
     for (i in 1:iteration){
        L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P)
        L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A)
        L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P)
        L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A)
        L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P)
        L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A)
        
        L_Q_VB_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval)
        L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont))/sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont)
        L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval))/sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval)
     }
  }
}

if(scenario=="augmente_10"){
   for(t in 1:20){
    for (i in 1:iteration){
      #Débit montaison Lempdes sur Alagnon
      L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,t] + log(1.10)
      L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr))
      L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,t] + log(1.10)
      #Débit montaison à Vieille-Brioude (secteur Langeac-Poutès)
      L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,t] + log(1.10)
      L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<- L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,t] + log(1.10)
      #Débit montaison à Prades (secteur amont Poutès)
      L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr))
      L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,t] + log(1.10)
      L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr))
      L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,t] + log(1.10)
       #Influence des débits sur la survie
      L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr))
      L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,t] + log(1.10)
      L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr))
      L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,t] + log(1.10)
      L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t]<-rnorm(n = 1, mean = mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval_20yr), sd = sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval_20yr))
      L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t]<-L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,t] + log(1.10)
  
    }
  }
   #Attention on centre-réduit en utilisant les données historiques de bugs car on veut bien mettre toute la série (retrospective et projection) sur la même "échelle" 
  for (t in (T+1):(T+20)){
     for (i in 1:iteration){
        L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P)
        L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A)
        L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P)
        L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A)
        L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P))/sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P)
        L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A))/sd(bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A)
        
        L_Q_VB_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_VB_deval_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval))/sd(bugs_L_Q_VB_deval)
        L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont))/sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_mont)
        L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]<-(L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr[i,(t-T)]-mean(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval))/sd(bugs_L_Q_MSL_deval)
     }
  }
}

```



```{r model_avec_distri_melange, echo=FALSE, eval=FALSE}

bugs_I_mm=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"I_mmCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"I_mmCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_ratio_surv=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"ratio_survCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"ratio_survCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_m_surv=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"m_survCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"m_survCODAindex.txt"))
bugs_p_surv=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"p_survCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"p_survCODAindex.txt"))


S_juv_JP<-keep_good_surf(surf_2021=TRUE)


#On met T+26 ou 25 pour pouvoir avoir à la fin un taux de renouvellement sur 20 ans (indicé t-5). Sur 20 ans en partant de T=42 +20 = 62 mais avec t-5 il faut finalement avoir t=67 (voire t=68 pour les t+1) pour calculer sur 20 ans
ratio_juv_prod_V=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
ratio_juv_prod_A=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
ratio_juv_prod_L=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
ratio_juv_prod_P=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
ratio_juv_A=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
ratio_juv_L=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
ratio_juv_P=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
L_ratio_juv_A=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
L_ratio_juv_L=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
L_ratio_juv_P=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
L_mu_Vichy_nm=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
L_mu_p_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
L_mu_p_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
L_mu_p_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
L_mu_d_wild_vichy=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
L_mu_d_wild_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
L_mu_d_wild_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
L_mu_d_wild_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
L_p_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
L_p_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
L_p_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
L_d_moy_vichy=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
L_d_moy_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
L_d_moy_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
L_d_moy_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
res_vichy=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
res_p_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
res_p_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
res_p_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
p_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
p_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
p_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
N_vichy=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
N_vichy_temp=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
N_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
N_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
N_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
min_N_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
S_vichy=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
S_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
S_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
S_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
d_moy_vichy=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
d_moy_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
d_moy_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
d_moy_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
juv_vichy=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
juv_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
juv_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
juv_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
juv_tot_vichy=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
juv_tot_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
juv_tot_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
juv_tot_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
juv_tot_system=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
bugs_juv_vichy=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
bugs_juv_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
bugs_juv_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
bugs_juv_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
bugs_juv_tot_vichy=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
bugs_juv_tot_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
bugs_juv_tot_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
bugs_juv_tot_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
bugs_juv_tot_system=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
ratio_habitat=array(0,dim=c(4,T+26))
I_mm=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+20))

coef_juv_1<-array(rep(0,T*5000),dim=c(iteration,T+25))
coef_juv_2<-array(rep(0,T*5000),dim=c(iteration,T+25))
coef_juv_3<-array(rep(0,T*5000),dim=c(iteration,T+25))
renew_rate=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+20))
renew_rate_q=array(0,dim=c((T+20),5))

for (t in 1:(T+26)){
	for (i in 1:4){
		ratio_habitat[i,t] <- S_juv_JP[i,t] /( S_juv_JP[1,t]+S_juv_JP[2,t]+S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t])
	}
}

#Pour avoir les premiers juv_tot sans les recalculer car fout la zone dans R car en a besoin pour calculer la suite
#On commence à T-6 et non T-5 pour avoir les juv qu'il faut pour calculer les coef_juv de l'année T (il faut donc calculer de t-2 à t-6)
for(t in (T-5):T){
	for (i in 1:iteration){ 
		bugs_juv_vichy[i,t]=bugs_dmoy_tot_V[i,t-1]*S_juv_JP[1,t]
		bugs_juv_alagnon[i,t]=bugs_dmoy_tot_A[i,t-1]*S_juv_JP[2,t]
		bugs_juv_langeac[i,t]=bugs_dmoy_tot_L[i,t-1]*S_juv_JP[3,t]
		bugs_juv_poutes[i,t]=bugs_dmoy_tot_P[i,t-12]*S_juv_JP[4,t]
	}
}	


#On démarre à T-1 pour pouvoir calculer les diagnostiques de conservation
for (t in (T-1):T){
	for (i in 1:iteration){ 
		bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t] = (1/3) * bugs_juv_vichy[i,t-3] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_vichy[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_vichy[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] = (1/3) * bugs_juv_alagnon[i,t-3] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_alagnon[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_alagnon[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t] = (1/3) * bugs_juv_langeac[i,t-3] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_langeac[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_langeac[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t] = (1/3) * bugs_juv_poutes[i,t-3] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_poutes[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_poutes[i,t-5]
		bugs_juv_tot_system[i,t] = bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t] + bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] + bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t] +bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t]#*bugs_rho_poutes[i]
		
		ratio_juv_prod_A[i,t] <- bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] / (bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])	
		ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t] <- (bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t]) / (bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t])# *bugs_rho_poutes[i] *bugs_rho_poutes[i])	
		#ratio_juv_prod_V[i,t] <- 1-ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t]
		
		ratio_juv_A[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*(S_juv_JP[2,t]/(S_juv_JP[1,t]+S_juv_JP[2,t]+S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_A[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_A[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_A[i,t])
		L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_A[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_A[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_L_mont_P[i]*bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_cr[t] + bugs_beta_Q_L_mont_A[i]*bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_cr[t]
		L_p_alagnon[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_alagnon[i]) 
		res_p_alagnon[i,t] <- L_p_alagnon[i,t]-L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t]
		
		ratio_juv_L[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*((S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t])/(S_juv_JP[1,t]+S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_L[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_L[i,t])
		L_mu_p_langeac[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_L[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_L[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_VB_mont_P[i]*bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P_cr[t] + bugs_beta_Q_VB_mont_A[i]*bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_cr[t]
		L_p_langeac[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_langeac[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_langeac[i]) 
		res_p_langeac[i,t] <- L_p_langeac[i,t]-L_mu_p_langeac[i,t]

		ratio_juv_prod_P[i,t] <-  bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t]/(bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])
		ratio_juv_P[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*(S_juv_JP[4,t]/(S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_P[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_P[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_P[i,t])
		L_mu_p_poutes[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_P[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_P[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_P_mont_P[i]*bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_cr[t] + bugs_beta_Q_P_mont_A[i]*bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_cr[t]
		L_p_poutes[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_poutes[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_poutes[i]) 
		res_p_poutes[i,t] <- L_p_poutes[i,t]-L_mu_p_poutes[i,t]
		
		L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t]<- log(bugs_s_juv2ad[i,(t-6)]*bugs_juv_tot_system[i,t] * bugs_ratio_surv[i]^bugs_I_mm[i,(t-6)]) #indice bugs_s_juv2ad sur le temps depuis ajout influence Q /  * pow(ratio_surv,I_mm[i,t])  pour modèle de mélange t-6 car bugs_I_mm commence à 7
		N_vichy[i,t]<-rlnorm(1,L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t],bugs_sigma_vichy[i])
			if (N_vichy[i,t]<3) {N_vichy[i,t]=3}
			if (N_vichy[i,t]>15000) {N_vichy[i,t]=15000}#I(3,15000)
		res_vichy[i,t] <- log(N_vichy[i,t])-L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t]
	
		p_alagnon[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_alagnon[i,t])	
		p_langeac[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_langeac[i,t])	
		p_poutes[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_poutes[i,t])	
		N_alagnon[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_vichy[i,t],0),p_alagnon[i,t])
		N_langeac[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_vichy[i,t]-N_alagnon[i,t],0),p_langeac[i,t])
		N_poutes[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_langeac[i,t],0),p_poutes[i,t])
		min_N_langeac[i,t]<-N_poutes[i,t]+1
			if(N_langeac[i,t]<min_N_langeac[i,t]){N_langeac[i,t]=min_N_langeac[i,t]}
		
		S_poutes[i,t]=max(N_poutes[i,t],1)
		S_langeac[i,t]=max(N_langeac[i,t]-N_poutes[i,t],1)
		S_alagnon[i,t]=max(N_alagnon[i,t],1)
		S_vichy[i,t]= max(N_vichy[i,t]-N_alagnon[i,t]-N_langeac[i,t],1)
		
		L_mu_d_wild_vichy[i,t+1]=log( (S_vichy[i,t]/S_juv_JP[1,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_vichy[i,t]/S_juv_JP[1,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,1]
		L_d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_vichy[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_vichy[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_vichy[i,t+1]=d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[1,t+1]
			
		L_mu_d_wild_alagnon[i,t+1]=log( (S_alagnon[i,t]/S_juv_JP[2,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_alagnon[i,t]/S_juv_JP[2,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,2]
		L_d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_alagnon[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_alagnon[i,t+1]=d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[2,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_langeac[i,t+1]=log( (S_langeac[i,t]/S_juv_JP[3,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_langeac[i,t]/S_juv_JP[3,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,3]
		L_d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_langeac[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_langeac[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_langeac[i,t+1]=d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[3,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_poutes[i,t+1]=log( (S_poutes[i,t]/S_juv_JP[4,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_poutes[i,t]/S_juv_JP[4,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,4]
		L_d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_poutes[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_poutes[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_poutes[i,t+1]=d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[4,t+1]
				
		}
}

#On scinde dans un nouveau bloc pour ajouter l'évolution des débits sur la survie et répartition des adultes
#qui intervient à partir de T+1
for (t in (T+1):(T+3)){
	for (i in 1:iteration){ 

#on recalcule I_mm à partir de bugs_p_surv pour les projections
I_mm[i,t]<-rbern(1,bugs_p_surv[i])
Qvb_deval[i,t] <- bugs_beta_Q_VB_deval[i]*L_Q_VB_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]
Qmsl_deval[i,t] <- bugs_beta_Q_MSL_deval[i]*L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]
Qmsl_mont[i,t] <- bugs_beta_Q_MSL_mont[i]*L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr_cr[i,t]
s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t] <- bugs_m_surv[i]* ilogit(Qvb_deval[i,t]) * ilogit(Qmsl_deval[i,t]) * ilogit(Qmsl_mont[i,t])
L_s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t] <- logit(s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t])

		bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t] = (1/3) * bugs_juv_vichy[i,t-3] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_vichy[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_vichy[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] = (1/3) * bugs_juv_alagnon[i,t-3] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_alagnon[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_alagnon[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t] = (1/3) * bugs_juv_langeac[i,t-3] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_langeac[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_langeac[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t] = (1/3) * bugs_juv_poutes[i,t-3] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_poutes[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_poutes[i,t-5]
		bugs_juv_tot_system[i,t] = bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t] + bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] + bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t] +bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t]#*bugs_rho_poutes[i]
		
		ratio_juv_prod_A[i,t] <- bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] / (bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])	
		ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t] <- (bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t]) / (bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t])# *bugs_rho_poutes[i] *bugs_rho_poutes[i])	
		#ratio_juv_prod_V[i,t] <- 1-ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t]
		
		ratio_juv_A[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*(S_juv_JP[2,t]/(S_juv_JP[1,t]+S_juv_JP[2,t]+S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_A[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_A[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_A[i,t])
		L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_A[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_A[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_L_mont_P[i]*L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t] + bugs_beta_Q_L_mont_A[i]*L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t] #on met les nouveaux débits centrés-réduits calculé dans le chunk "simulation_q_identique"
		L_p_alagnon[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_alagnon[i]) 
		res_p_alagnon[i,t] <- L_p_alagnon[i,t]-L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t]
		
		ratio_juv_L[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*((S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t])/(S_juv_JP[1,t]+S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_L[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_L[i,t])
		L_mu_p_langeac[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_L[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_L[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_VB_mont_P[i]*L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t] + bugs_beta_Q_VB_mont_A[i]*L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]  #on met les nouveaux débits centrés-réduits calculé dans le chunk "simulation_q_identique"
		L_p_langeac[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_langeac[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_langeac[i]) 
		res_p_langeac[i,t] <- L_p_langeac[i,t]-L_mu_p_langeac[i,t]

		ratio_juv_prod_P[i,t] <-  bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t]/(bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])
		ratio_juv_P[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*(S_juv_JP[4,t]/(S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_P[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_P[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_P[i,t])
		L_mu_p_poutes[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_P[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_P[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_P_mont_P[i]*L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t] + bugs_beta_Q_P_mont_A[i]*L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]  #on met les nouveaux débits centrés-réduits calculé dans le chunk "simulation_q_identique"
		L_p_poutes[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_poutes[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_poutes[i]) 
		res_p_poutes[i,t] <- L_p_poutes[i,t]-L_mu_p_poutes[i,t]
		
		L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t]<- log(s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t]*bugs_juv_tot_system[i,t] * bugs_ratio_surv[i]^I_mm[i,t]) #on remplace bugs_s_juv2ad par s_juv2ad_20yr qui a été recalculé pour conserver l'effet des Q sur la survie
		N_vichy[i,t]<-rlnorm(1,L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t],bugs_sigma_vichy[i])
			if (N_vichy[i,t]<3) {N_vichy[i,t]=3}
			if (N_vichy[i,t]>15000) {N_vichy[i,t]=15000}#I(3,15000)
		res_vichy[i,t] <- log(N_vichy[i,t])-L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t]
	
		p_alagnon[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_alagnon[i,t])	
		p_langeac[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_langeac[i,t])	
		p_poutes[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_poutes[i,t])	
		N_alagnon[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_vichy[i,t],0),p_alagnon[i,t])
		N_langeac[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_vichy[i,t]-N_alagnon[i,t],0),p_langeac[i,t])
		N_poutes[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_langeac[i,t],0),p_poutes[i,t])
		min_N_langeac[i,t]<-N_poutes[i,t]+1
			if(N_langeac[i,t]<min_N_langeac[i,t]){N_langeac[i,t]=min_N_langeac[i,t]}
		
		S_poutes[i,t]=max(N_poutes[i,t],1)
		S_langeac[i,t]=max(N_langeac[i,t]-N_poutes[i,t],1)
		S_alagnon[i,t]=max(N_alagnon[i,t],1)
		S_vichy[i,t]= max(N_vichy[i,t]-N_alagnon[i,t]-N_langeac[i,t],1)
		
		L_mu_d_wild_vichy[i,t+1]=log( (S_vichy[i,t]/S_juv_JP[1,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_vichy[i,t]/S_juv_JP[1,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,1]
		L_d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_vichy[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_vichy[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_vichy[i,t+1]=d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[1,t+1]
			
		L_mu_d_wild_alagnon[i,t+1]=log( (S_alagnon[i,t]/S_juv_JP[2,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_alagnon[i,t]/S_juv_JP[2,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,2]
		L_d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_alagnon[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_alagnon[i,t+1]=d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[2,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_langeac[i,t+1]=log( (S_langeac[i,t]/S_juv_JP[3,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_langeac[i,t]/S_juv_JP[3,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,3]
		L_d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_langeac[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_langeac[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_langeac[i,t+1]=d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[3,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_poutes[i,t+1]=log( (S_poutes[i,t]/S_juv_JP[4,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_poutes[i,t]/S_juv_JP[4,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,4]
		L_d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_poutes[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_poutes[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_poutes[i,t+1]=d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[4,t+1]
				
		}
}

#Les juvéniles t-3 sont maintenant ceux calculés à la fin de la première boucle et non plus ceux issus directement d'openbugs
for (t in (T+4):(T+4)){
	for (i in 1:iteration){ 
	  
#on recalcule I_mm à partir de bugs_p_surv pour les projections
I_mm[i,t]<-rbern(1,bugs_p_surv[i])	  
Qvb_deval[i,t] <- bugs_beta_Q_VB_deval[i]*L_Q_VB_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]
Qmsl_deval[i,t] <- bugs_beta_Q_MSL_deval[i]*L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]
Qmsl_mont[i,t] <- bugs_beta_Q_MSL_mont[i]*L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr_cr[i,t]
s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t] <- bugs_m_surv[i]* ilogit(Qvb_deval[i,t]) * ilogit(Qmsl_deval[i,t]) * ilogit(Qmsl_mont[i,t])
L_s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t] <- logit(s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t])

		bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t] = (1/3) * juv_vichy[i,t-3] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_vichy[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_vichy[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] = (1/3) * juv_alagnon[i,t-3] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_alagnon[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_alagnon[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t] = (1/3) * juv_langeac[i,t-3] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_langeac[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_langeac[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t] = (1/3) * juv_poutes[i,t-3] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_poutes[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_poutes[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_system[i,t] = bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t] +bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t]#*bugs_rho_poutes[i]
		
		ratio_juv_prod_A[i,t] <- bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] / (bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])	
		ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t] <- (bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t]) / (bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])	
		#ratio_juv_prod_V[i,t] <- 1-ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t]
		
		ratio_juv_A[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*(S_juv_JP[2,t]/(S_juv_JP[1,t]+S_juv_JP[2,t]+S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_A[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_A[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_A[i,t])
		L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_A[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_A[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_L_mont_P[i]*L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t] + bugs_beta_Q_L_mont_A[i]*L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t] #on met les nouveaux débits centrés-réduits calculé dans le chunk "simulation_q_identique"
		L_p_alagnon[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_alagnon[i]) 
		res_p_alagnon[i,t] <- L_p_alagnon[i,t]-L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t]
		
		ratio_juv_L[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*((S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t])/(S_juv_JP[1,t]+S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_L[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_L[i,t])
		L_mu_p_langeac[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_L[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_L[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_VB_mont_P[i]*L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t] + bugs_beta_Q_VB_mont_A[i]*L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]  #on met les nouveaux débits centrés-réduits calculé dans le chunk "simulation_q_identique"
		L_p_langeac[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_langeac[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_langeac[i]) 
		res_p_langeac[i,t] <- L_p_langeac[i,t]-L_mu_p_langeac[i,t]
		
		ratio_juv_prod_P[i,t] <-  bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t]/(bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])
		ratio_juv_P[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*(S_juv_JP[4,t]/(S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_P[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_P[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_P[i,t])
		L_mu_p_poutes[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_P[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_P[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_P_mont_P[i]*L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t] + bugs_beta_Q_P_mont_A[i]*L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]  #on met les nouveaux débits centrés-réduits calculé dans le chunk "simulation_q_identique"
	
		L_p_poutes[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_poutes[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_poutes[i]) 
		res_p_poutes[i,t] <- L_p_poutes[i,t]-L_mu_p_poutes[i,t]
		
		L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t]<- log(s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t]*bugs_juv_tot_system[i,t] * bugs_ratio_surv[i]^I_mm[i,t]) 
		N_vichy[i,t]<-rlnorm(1,L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t],bugs_sigma_vichy[i])
			if (N_vichy[i,t]<3) {N_vichy[i,t]=3}
			if (N_vichy[i,t]>15000) {N_vichy[i,t]=15000}#I(3,15000)
		res_vichy[i,t] <- log(N_vichy[i,t])-L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t]
		
		p_alagnon[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_alagnon[i,t])	
		p_langeac[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_langeac[i,t])	
		p_poutes[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_poutes[i,t])	
		N_alagnon[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_vichy[i,t],0),p_alagnon[i,t])
		N_langeac[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_vichy[i,t]-N_alagnon[i,t],0),p_langeac[i,t])
		N_poutes[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_langeac[i,t],0),p_poutes[i,t])
		min_N_langeac[i,t]<-N_poutes[i,t]+1
			if(N_langeac[i,t]<min_N_langeac[i,t]){N_langeac[i,t]=min_N_langeac[i,t]}
				
		S_poutes[i,t]=max(N_poutes[i,t],1)
		S_langeac[i,t]=max(N_langeac[i,t]-N_poutes[i,t],1)
		S_alagnon[i,t]=max(N_alagnon[i,t],1)
		S_vichy[i,t]= max(N_vichy[i,t]-N_alagnon[i,t]-N_langeac[i,t],1)
		
		L_mu_d_wild_vichy[i,t+1]=log( (S_vichy[i,t]/S_juv_JP[1,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_vichy[i,t]/S_juv_JP[1,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,1]
		L_d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_vichy[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_vichy[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_vichy[i,t+1]=d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[1,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_alagnon[i,t+1]=log( (S_alagnon[i,t]/S_juv_JP[2,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_alagnon[i,t]/S_juv_JP[2,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,2]
		L_d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_alagnon[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_alagnon[i,t+1]=d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[2,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_langeac[i,t+1]=log( (S_langeac[i,t]/S_juv_JP[3,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_langeac[i,t]/S_juv_JP[3,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,3]
		L_d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_langeac[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_langeac[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_langeac[i,t+1]=d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[3,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_poutes[i,t+1]=log( (S_poutes[i,t]/S_juv_JP[4,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_poutes[i,t]/S_juv_JP[4,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,4]
		L_d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_poutes[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_poutes[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_poutes[i,t+1]=d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[4,t+1]
		
	}
}

#Les juvéniles t-3 et t-4 sont maintenant ceux calculés à la fin des boucles précédentes et non plus ceux issus directement d'openbugs
for (t in (T+5):(T+5)){
	for (i in 1:iteration){ 

	#on recalcule I_mm à partir de bugs_p_surv pour les projections
I_mm[i,t]<-rbern(1,bugs_p_surv[i])  	  
Qvb_deval[i,t] <- bugs_beta_Q_VB_deval[i]*L_Q_VB_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]
Qmsl_deval[i,t] <- bugs_beta_Q_MSL_deval[i]*L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]
Qmsl_mont[i,t] <- bugs_beta_Q_MSL_mont[i]*L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr_cr[i,t]
s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t] <- bugs_m_surv[i]* ilogit(Qvb_deval[i,t]) * ilogit(Qmsl_deval[i,t]) * ilogit(Qmsl_mont[i,t])
L_s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t] <- logit(s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t])

		bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t] = (1/3) * juv_vichy[i,t-3] + (1/3) * juv_vichy[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_vichy[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] = (1/3) * juv_alagnon[i,t-3] + (1/3) * juv_alagnon[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_alagnon[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t] = (1/3) * juv_langeac[i,t-3] + (1/3) * juv_langeac[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_langeac[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t] = (1/3) * juv_poutes[i,t-3] + (1/3) * juv_poutes[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_poutes[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_system[i,t] = bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t] +bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t]#*bugs_rho_poutes[i]
		
		ratio_juv_prod_A[i,t] <- bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] / (bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])	
		ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t] <- (bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t]) / (bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])	
		#ratio_juv_prod_V[i,t] <- 1-ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t]
		
		ratio_juv_A[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*(S_juv_JP[2,t]/(S_juv_JP[1,t]+S_juv_JP[2,t]+S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_A[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_A[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_A[i,t])
		L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_A[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_A[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_L_mont_P[i]*L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t] + bugs_beta_Q_L_mont_A[i]*L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t] #on met les nouveaux débits centrés-réduits calculé dans le chunk "simulation_q_identique"
		
		L_p_alagnon[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_alagnon[i]) 
		res_p_alagnon[i,t] <- L_p_alagnon[i,t]-L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t]
		
		ratio_juv_L[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*((S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t])/(S_juv_JP[1,t]+S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_L[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_L[i,t])
		L_mu_p_langeac[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_L[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_L[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_VB_mont_P[i]*L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t] + bugs_beta_Q_VB_mont_A[i]*L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]  #on met les nouveaux débits centrés-réduits calculé dans le chunk "simulation_q_identique"
		L_p_langeac[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_langeac[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_langeac[i]) 
		res_p_langeac[i,t] <- L_p_langeac[i,t]-L_mu_p_langeac[i,t]
		
		ratio_juv_prod_P[i,t] <-  bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t]/(bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])
		ratio_juv_P[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*(S_juv_JP[4,t]/(S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_P[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_P[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_P[i,t])
		L_mu_p_poutes[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_P[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_P[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_P_mont_P[i]*L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t] + bugs_beta_Q_P_mont_A[i]*L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]  #on met les nouveaux débits centrés-réduits calculé dans le chunk "simulation_q_identique"
	
		L_p_poutes[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_poutes[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_poutes[i]) 
		res_p_poutes[i,t] <- L_p_poutes[i,t]-L_mu_p_poutes[i,t]
		
		L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t]<- log(s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t]*bugs_juv_tot_system[i,t] * bugs_ratio_surv[i]^I_mm[i,t]) 
		N_vichy[i,t]<-rlnorm(1,L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t],bugs_sigma_vichy[i])
			if (N_vichy[i,t]<3) {N_vichy[i,t]=3}
			if (N_vichy[i,t]>15000) {N_vichy[i,t]=15000}#I(3,15000)
		res_vichy[i,t] <- log(N_vichy[i,t])-L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t]
		
		p_alagnon[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_alagnon[i,t])	
		p_langeac[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_langeac[i,t])	
		p_poutes[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_poutes[i,t])	
		N_alagnon[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_vichy[i,t],0),p_alagnon[i,t])
		N_langeac[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_vichy[i,t]-N_alagnon[i,t],0),p_langeac[i,t])
		N_poutes[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_langeac[i,t],0),p_poutes[i,t])
		min_N_langeac[i,t]<-N_poutes[i,t]+1
			if(N_langeac[i,t]<min_N_langeac[i,t]){N_langeac[i,t]=min_N_langeac[i,t]}
		
		S_poutes[i,t]=max(N_poutes[i,t],1)
		S_langeac[i,t]=max(N_langeac[i,t]-N_poutes[i,t],1)
		S_alagnon[i,t]=max(N_alagnon[i,t],1)
		S_vichy[i,t]= max(N_vichy[i,t]-N_alagnon[i,t]-N_langeac[i,t],1)
		
		L_mu_d_wild_vichy[i,t+1]=log( (S_vichy[i,t]/S_juv_JP[1,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_vichy[i,t]/S_juv_JP[1,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,1]
		L_d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_vichy[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_vichy[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_vichy[i,t+1]=d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[1,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_alagnon[i,t+1]=log( (S_alagnon[i,t]/S_juv_JP[2,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_alagnon[i,t]/S_juv_JP[2,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,2]
		L_d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_alagnon[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_alagnon[i,t+1]=d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[2,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_langeac[i,t+1]=log( (S_langeac[i,t]/S_juv_JP[3,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_langeac[i,t]/S_juv_JP[3,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,3]
		L_d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_langeac[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_langeac[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_langeac[i,t+1]=d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[3,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_poutes[i,t+1]=log( (S_poutes[i,t]/S_juv_JP[4,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_poutes[i,t]/S_juv_JP[4,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,4]
		L_d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_poutes[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_poutes[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_poutes[i,t+1]=d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[4,t+1]
		
	}
}

#Les juvéniles t-3 et t-4 t-5 sont maintenant ceux calculés à la fin des boucles précédentes et non plus ceux issus directement d'openbugs
#On va jusqu'à T+21 pour pouvoir calculer renew_rate sur 20 ans (sinon manque une année car on a besoin de faire N_vichy[T+21]
for (t in (T+6):(T+20)){
	for (i in 1:iteration){ 

#on recalcule I_mm à partir de bugs_p_surv pour les projections
I_mm[i,t]<-rbern(1,bugs_p_surv[i])	  
Qvb_deval[i,t] <- bugs_beta_Q_VB_deval[i]*L_Q_VB_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]
Qmsl_deval[i,t] <- bugs_beta_Q_MSL_deval[i]*L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]
Qmsl_mont[i,t] <- bugs_beta_Q_MSL_mont[i]*L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr_cr[i,t]
s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t] <- bugs_m_surv[i]* ilogit(Qvb_deval[i,t]) * ilogit(Qmsl_deval[i,t]) * ilogit(Qmsl_mont[i,t])
L_s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t] <- logit(s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t])

		juv_tot_vichy[i,t] = (1/3) * juv_vichy[i,t-3] + (1/3) * juv_vichy[i,t-4] + (1/3) * juv_vichy[i,t-5] 
		juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] = (1/3) * juv_alagnon[i,t-3] + (1/3) * juv_alagnon[i,t-4] + (1/3) * juv_alagnon[i,t-5] 
		juv_tot_langeac[i,t] = (1/3) * juv_langeac[i,t-3] + (1/3) * juv_langeac[i,t-4] + (1/3) * juv_langeac[i,t-5] 
		juv_tot_poutes[i,t] = (1/3) * juv_poutes[i,t-3] + (1/3) * juv_poutes[i,t-4] + (1/3) * juv_poutes[i,t-5] 
		juv_tot_system[i,t] = juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+juv_tot_alagnon[i,t]+juv_tot_langeac[i,t] +juv_tot_poutes[i,t]#*bugs_rho_poutes[i]
		
		ratio_juv_prod_A[i,t] <- juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] / (juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+juv_tot_alagnon[i,t]+juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])	
		ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t] <- (juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+juv_tot_poutes[i,t]) / (juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])	
		#ratio_juv_prod_V[i,t] <- 1-ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t]
		
		ratio_juv_A[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*(S_juv_JP[2,t]/(S_juv_JP[1,t]+S_juv_JP[2,t]+S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_A[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_A[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_A[i,t])
		L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_A[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_A[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_L_mont_P[i]*L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t] + bugs_beta_Q_L_mont_A[i]*L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t] #on met les nouveaux débits centrés-réduits calculé dans le chunk "simulation_q_identique"
		
		L_p_alagnon[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_alagnon[i]) 
		res_p_alagnon[i,t] <- L_p_alagnon[i,t]-L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t]
				
		ratio_juv_L[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*((S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t])/(S_juv_JP[1,t]+S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t]
```
