```{r model_avec_distri_melange, echo=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
		L_ratio_juv_L[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_L[i,t])
		L_mu_p_langeac[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_L[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_L[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_VB_mont_P[i]*L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t] + bugs_beta_Q_VB_mont_A[i]*L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]  #on met les nouveaux débits centrés-réduits calculé dans le chunk "simulation_q_identique"
		L_p_langeac[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_langeac[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_langeac[i]) 
		res_p_langeac[i,t] <- L_p_langeac[i,t]-L_mu_p_langeac[i,t]
	
		ratio_juv_prod_P[i,t] <-  juv_tot_poutes[i,t]/(juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])
		ratio_juv_P[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*(S_juv_JP[4,t]/(S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_P[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_P[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_P[i,t])
		L_mu_p_poutes[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_P[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_P[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_P_mont_P[i]*L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t] + bugs_beta_Q_P_mont_A[i]*L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]  #on met les nouveaux débits centrés-réduits calculé dans le chunk "simulation_q_identique"
	
		L_p_poutes[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_poutes[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_poutes[i]) 
		res_p_poutes[i,t] <- L_p_poutes[i,t]-L_mu_p_poutes[i,t]
		
		L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t]<- log(s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t]*juv_tot_system[i,t] * bugs_ratio_surv[i]^I_mm[i,t]) 
		N_vichy[i,t]<-rlnorm(1,L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t],bugs_sigma_vichy[i])
			if (N_vichy[i,t]<3) {N_vichy[i,t]=3}
			if (N_vichy[i,t]>15000) {N_vichy[i,t]=15000}#I(3,15000)
		res_vichy[i,t] <- log(N_vichy[i,t])-L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t]
		
		p_alagnon[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_alagnon[i,t])	
		p_langeac[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_langeac[i,t])	
		p_poutes[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_poutes[i,t])	
		N_alagnon[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_vichy[i,t],0),p_alagnon[i,t])
		N_langeac[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_vichy[i,t]-N_alagnon[i,t],0),p_langeac[i,t])
		N_poutes[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_langeac[i,t],0),p_poutes[i,t])
		min_N_langeac[i,t]<-N_poutes[i,t]+1
			if(N_langeac[i,t]<min_N_langeac[i,t]){N_langeac[i,t]=min_N_langeac[i,t]}
				
		
		S_poutes[i,t]=max(N_poutes[i,t],1)
		S_langeac[i,t]=max(N_langeac[i,t]-N_poutes[i,t],1)
		S_alagnon[i,t]=max(N_alagnon[i,t],1)
		S_vichy[i,t]= max(N_vichy[i,t]-N_alagnon[i,t]-N_langeac[i,t],1)
		
		L_mu_d_wild_vichy[i,t+1]=log( (S_vichy[i,t]/S_juv_JP[1,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_vichy[i,t]/S_juv_JP[1,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,1]
		L_d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_vichy[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_vichy[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_vichy[i,t+1]=d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[1,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_alagnon[i,t+1]=log( (S_alagnon[i,t]/S_juv_JP[2,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_alagnon[i,t]/S_juv_JP[2,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,2]
		L_d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_alagnon[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_alagnon[i,t+1]=d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[2,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_langeac[i,t+1]=log( (S_langeac[i,t]/S_juv_JP[3,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_langeac[i,t]/S_juv_JP[3,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,3]
		L_d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_langeac[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_langeac[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_langeac[i,t+1]=d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[3,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_poutes[i,t+1]=log( (S_poutes[i,t]/S_juv_JP[4,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_poutes[i,t]/S_juv_JP[4,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,4]
		L_d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_poutes[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_poutes[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_poutes[i,t+1]=d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[4,t+1]
		
	}
}

```



```{r model_sans_distri_melange, echo=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
bugs_m_surv=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"m_survCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"m_survCODAindex.txt"))

S_juv_JP<-keep_good_surf(surf_2021=TRUE)


#On met T+26 ou 25 pour pouvoir avoir à la fin un taux de renouvellement sur 20 ans (indicé t-5). Sur 20 ans en partant de T=42 +20 = 62 mais avec t-5 il faut finalement avoir t=67 (voire t=68 pour les t+1) pour calculer sur 20 ans
ratio_juv_prod_V=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
ratio_juv_prod_A=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
ratio_juv_prod_L=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
ratio_juv_prod_P=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
ratio_juv_A=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
ratio_juv_L=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
ratio_juv_P=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
L_ratio_juv_A=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
L_ratio_juv_L=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
L_ratio_juv_P=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
L_mu_Vichy_nm=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
L_mu_p_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
L_mu_p_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
L_mu_p_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
L_mu_d_wild_vichy=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
L_mu_d_wild_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
L_mu_d_wild_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
L_mu_d_wild_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
L_p_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
L_p_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
L_p_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
L_d_moy_vichy=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
L_d_moy_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
L_d_moy_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
L_d_moy_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
res_vichy=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
res_p_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
res_p_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
res_p_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
p_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
p_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
p_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
N_vichy=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
N_vichy_temp=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
N_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
N_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
N_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
min_N_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
S_vichy=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
S_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
S_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
S_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
d_moy_vichy=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
d_moy_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
d_moy_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
d_moy_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
juv_vichy=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
juv_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
juv_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
juv_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+27))
juv_tot_vichy=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
juv_tot_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
juv_tot_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
juv_tot_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
juv_tot_system=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
bugs_juv_vichy=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
bugs_juv_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
bugs_juv_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
bugs_juv_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
bugs_juv_tot_vichy=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
bugs_juv_tot_alagnon=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
bugs_juv_tot_langeac=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
bugs_juv_tot_poutes=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
bugs_juv_tot_system=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+26))
ratio_habitat=array(0,dim=c(4,T+26))
I_mm=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+20))

coef_juv_1<-array(rep(0,T*5000),dim=c(iteration,T+25))
coef_juv_2<-array(rep(0,T*5000),dim=c(iteration,T+25))
coef_juv_3<-array(rep(0,T*5000),dim=c(iteration,T+25))
renew_rate=array(0,dim=c(iteration,T+20))
renew_rate_q=array(0,dim=c((T+20),5))

for (t in 1:(T+26)){
	for (i in 1:4){
		ratio_habitat[i,t] <- S_juv_JP[i,t] /( S_juv_JP[1,t]+S_juv_JP[2,t]+S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t])
	}
}

#Pour avoir les premiers juv_tot sans les recalculer car fout la zone dans R car en a besoin pour calculer la suite
#On commence à T-6 et non T-5 pour avoir les juv qu'il faut pour calculer les coef_juv de l'année T (il faut donc calculer de t-2 à t-6)
for(t in (T-5):T){
	for (i in 1:iteration){ 
		bugs_juv_vichy[i,t]=bugs_dmoy_tot_V[i,t-1]*S_juv_JP[1,t]
		bugs_juv_alagnon[i,t]=bugs_dmoy_tot_A[i,t-1]*S_juv_JP[2,t]
		bugs_juv_langeac[i,t]=bugs_dmoy_tot_L[i,t-1]*S_juv_JP[3,t]
		bugs_juv_poutes[i,t]=bugs_dmoy_tot_P[i,t-12]*S_juv_JP[4,t]
	}
}	


#On démarre à T-1 pour pouvoir calculer les diagnostiques de conservation
for (t in (T-1):T){
	for (i in 1:iteration){ 
		bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t] = (1/3) * bugs_juv_vichy[i,t-3] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_vichy[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_vichy[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] = (1/3) * bugs_juv_alagnon[i,t-3] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_alagnon[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_alagnon[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t] = (1/3) * bugs_juv_langeac[i,t-3] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_langeac[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_langeac[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t] = (1/3) * bugs_juv_poutes[i,t-3] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_poutes[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_poutes[i,t-5]
		bugs_juv_tot_system[i,t] = bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t] + bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] + bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t] +bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t]#*bugs_rho_poutes[i]
		
		ratio_juv_prod_A[i,t] <- bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] / (bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])	
		ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t] <- (bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t]) / (bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t])# *bugs_rho_poutes[i] *bugs_rho_poutes[i])	
		#ratio_juv_prod_V[i,t] <- 1-ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t]
		
		ratio_juv_A[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*(S_juv_JP[2,t]/(S_juv_JP[1,t]+S_juv_JP[2,t]+S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_A[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_A[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_A[i,t])
		L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_A[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_A[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_L_mont_P[i]*bugs_L_Q_L_mont_P_cr[t] + bugs_beta_Q_L_mont_A[i]*bugs_L_Q_L_mont_A_cr[t]
		L_p_alagnon[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_alagnon[i]) 
		res_p_alagnon[i,t] <- L_p_alagnon[i,t]-L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t]
		
		ratio_juv_L[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*((S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t])/(S_juv_JP[1,t]+S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_L[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_L[i,t])
		L_mu_p_langeac[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_L[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_L[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_VB_mont_P[i]*bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_P_cr[t] + bugs_beta_Q_VB_mont_A[i]*bugs_L_Q_VB_mont_A_cr[t]
		L_p_langeac[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_langeac[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_langeac[i]) 
		res_p_langeac[i,t] <- L_p_langeac[i,t]-L_mu_p_langeac[i,t]

		ratio_juv_prod_P[i,t] <-  bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t]/(bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])
		ratio_juv_P[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*(S_juv_JP[4,t]/(S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_P[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_P[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_P[i,t])
		L_mu_p_poutes[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_P[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_P[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_P_mont_P[i]*bugs_L_Q_P_mont_P_cr[t] + bugs_beta_Q_P_mont_A[i]*bugs_L_Q_P_mont_A_cr[t]
		L_p_poutes[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_poutes[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_poutes[i]) 
		res_p_poutes[i,t] <- L_p_poutes[i,t]-L_mu_p_poutes[i,t]
		
		L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t]<- log(bugs_s_juv2ad[i,(t-6)]*bugs_juv_tot_system[i,t]) #indice bugs_s_juv2ad sur le temps depuis ajout influence Q /  * pow(ratio_surv,I_mm[t])  pour modèle de mélange
		N_vichy[i,t]<-rlnorm(1,L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t],bugs_sigma_vichy[i])
			if (N_vichy[i,t]<3) {N_vichy[i,t]=3}
			if (N_vichy[i,t]>15000) {N_vichy[i,t]=15000}#I(3,15000)
		res_vichy[i,t] <- log(N_vichy[i,t])-L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t]
	
		p_alagnon[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_alagnon[i,t])	
		p_langeac[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_langeac[i,t])	
		p_poutes[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_poutes[i,t])	
		N_alagnon[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_vichy[i,t],0),p_alagnon[i,t])
		N_langeac[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_vichy[i,t]-N_alagnon[i,t],0),p_langeac[i,t])
		N_poutes[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_langeac[i,t],0),p_poutes[i,t])
		min_N_langeac[i,t]<-N_poutes[i,t]+1
			if(N_langeac[i,t]<min_N_langeac[i,t]){N_langeac[i,t]=min_N_langeac[i,t]}
		
		S_poutes[i,t]=max(N_poutes[i,t],1)
		S_langeac[i,t]=max(N_langeac[i,t]-N_poutes[i,t],1)
		S_alagnon[i,t]=max(N_alagnon[i,t],1)
		S_vichy[i,t]= max(N_vichy[i,t]-N_alagnon[i,t]-N_langeac[i,t],1)
		
		L_mu_d_wild_vichy[i,t+1]=log( (S_vichy[i,t]/S_juv_JP[1,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_vichy[i,t]/S_juv_JP[1,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,1]
		L_d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_vichy[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_vichy[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_vichy[i,t+1]=d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[1,t+1]
			
		L_mu_d_wild_alagnon[i,t+1]=log( (S_alagnon[i,t]/S_juv_JP[2,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_alagnon[i,t]/S_juv_JP[2,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,2]
		L_d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_alagnon[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_alagnon[i,t+1]=d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[2,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_langeac[i,t+1]=log( (S_langeac[i,t]/S_juv_JP[3,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_langeac[i,t]/S_juv_JP[3,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,3]
		L_d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_langeac[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_langeac[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_langeac[i,t+1]=d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[3,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_poutes[i,t+1]=log( (S_poutes[i,t]/S_juv_JP[4,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_poutes[i,t]/S_juv_JP[4,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,4]
		L_d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_poutes[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_poutes[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_poutes[i,t+1]=d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[4,t+1]
				
		}
}

#On scinde dans un nouveau bloc pour ajouter l'évolution des débits sur la survie et répartition des adultes
#qui intervient à partir de T+1
for (t in (T+1):(T+3)){
	for (i in 1:iteration){ 

Qvb_deval[i,t] <- bugs_beta_Q_VB_deval[i]*L_Q_VB_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]
Qmsl_deval[i,t] <- bugs_beta_Q_MSL_deval[i]*L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]
Qmsl_mont[i,t] <- bugs_beta_Q_MSL_mont[i]*L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr_cr[i,t]
s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t] <- bugs_m_surv[i]* ilogit(Qvb_deval[i,t]) * ilogit(Qmsl_deval[i,t]) * ilogit(Qmsl_mont[i,t])
L_s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t] <- logit(s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t])

		bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t] = (1/3) * bugs_juv_vichy[i,t-3] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_vichy[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_vichy[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] = (1/3) * bugs_juv_alagnon[i,t-3] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_alagnon[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_alagnon[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t] = (1/3) * bugs_juv_langeac[i,t-3] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_langeac[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_langeac[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t] = (1/3) * bugs_juv_poutes[i,t-3] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_poutes[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_poutes[i,t-5]
		bugs_juv_tot_system[i,t] = bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t] + bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] + bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t] +bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t]#*bugs_rho_poutes[i]
		
		ratio_juv_prod_A[i,t] <- bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] / (bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])	
		ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t] <- (bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t]) / (bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t])# *bugs_rho_poutes[i] *bugs_rho_poutes[i])	
		#ratio_juv_prod_V[i,t] <- 1-ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t]
		
		ratio_juv_A[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*(S_juv_JP[2,t]/(S_juv_JP[1,t]+S_juv_JP[2,t]+S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_A[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_A[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_A[i,t])
		L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_A[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_A[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_L_mont_P[i]*L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t] + bugs_beta_Q_L_mont_A[i]*L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t] #on met les nouveaux débits centrés-réduits calculé dans le chunk "simulation_q_identique"
		L_p_alagnon[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_alagnon[i]) 
		res_p_alagnon[i,t] <- L_p_alagnon[i,t]-L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t]
		
		ratio_juv_L[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*((S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t])/(S_juv_JP[1,t]+S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_L[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_L[i,t])
		L_mu_p_langeac[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_L[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_L[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_VB_mont_P[i]*L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t] + bugs_beta_Q_VB_mont_A[i]*L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]  #on met les nouveaux débits centrés-réduits calculé dans le chunk "simulation_q_identique"
		L_p_langeac[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_langeac[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_langeac[i]) 
		res_p_langeac[i,t] <- L_p_langeac[i,t]-L_mu_p_langeac[i,t]

		ratio_juv_prod_P[i,t] <-  bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t]/(bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])
		ratio_juv_P[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*(S_juv_JP[4,t]/(S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_P[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_P[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_P[i,t])
		L_mu_p_poutes[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_P[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_P[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_P_mont_P[i]*L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t] + bugs_beta_Q_P_mont_A[i]*L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]  #on met les nouveaux débits centrés-réduits calculé dans le chunk "simulation_q_identique"
		L_p_poutes[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_poutes[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_poutes[i]) 
		res_p_poutes[i,t] <- L_p_poutes[i,t]-L_mu_p_poutes[i,t]
		
		L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t]<- log(s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t]*bugs_juv_tot_system[i,t]) #on remplace bugs_s_juv2ad par s_juv2ad_20yr qui a été recalculé pour conserver l'effet des Q sur la survie
		N_vichy[i,t]<-rlnorm(1,L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t],bugs_sigma_vichy[i])
			if (N_vichy[i,t]<3) {N_vichy[i,t]=3}
			if (N_vichy[i,t]>15000) {N_vichy[i,t]=15000}#I(3,15000)
		res_vichy[i,t] <- log(N_vichy[i,t])-L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t]
	
		p_alagnon[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_alagnon[i,t])	
		p_langeac[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_langeac[i,t])	
		p_poutes[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_poutes[i,t])	
		N_alagnon[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_vichy[i,t],0),p_alagnon[i,t])
		N_langeac[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_vichy[i,t]-N_alagnon[i,t],0),p_langeac[i,t])
		N_poutes[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_langeac[i,t],0),p_poutes[i,t])
		min_N_langeac[i,t]<-N_poutes[i,t]+1
			if(N_langeac[i,t]<min_N_langeac[i,t]){N_langeac[i,t]=min_N_langeac[i,t]}
		
		S_poutes[i,t]=max(N_poutes[i,t],1)
		S_langeac[i,t]=max(N_langeac[i,t]-N_poutes[i,t],1)
		S_alagnon[i,t]=max(N_alagnon[i,t],1)
		S_vichy[i,t]= max(N_vichy[i,t]-N_alagnon[i,t]-N_langeac[i,t],1)
		
		L_mu_d_wild_vichy[i,t+1]=log( (S_vichy[i,t]/S_juv_JP[1,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_vichy[i,t]/S_juv_JP[1,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,1]
		L_d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_vichy[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_vichy[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_vichy[i,t+1]=d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[1,t+1]
			
		L_mu_d_wild_alagnon[i,t+1]=log( (S_alagnon[i,t]/S_juv_JP[2,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_alagnon[i,t]/S_juv_JP[2,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,2]
		L_d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_alagnon[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_alagnon[i,t+1]=d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[2,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_langeac[i,t+1]=log( (S_langeac[i,t]/S_juv_JP[3,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_langeac[i,t]/S_juv_JP[3,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,3]
		L_d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_langeac[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_langeac[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_langeac[i,t+1]=d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[3,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_poutes[i,t+1]=log( (S_poutes[i,t]/S_juv_JP[4,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_poutes[i,t]/S_juv_JP[4,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,4]
		L_d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_poutes[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_poutes[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_poutes[i,t+1]=d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[4,t+1]
				
		}
}

#Les juvéniles t-3 sont maintenant ceux calculés à la fin de la première boucle et non plus ceux issus directement d'openbugs
for (t in (T+4):(T+4)){
	for (i in 1:iteration){ 
	  
Qvb_deval[i,t] <- bugs_beta_Q_VB_deval[i]*L_Q_VB_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]
Qmsl_deval[i,t] <- bugs_beta_Q_MSL_deval[i]*L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]
Qmsl_mont[i,t] <- bugs_beta_Q_MSL_mont[i]*L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr_cr[i,t]
s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t] <- bugs_m_surv[i]* ilogit(Qvb_deval[i,t]) * ilogit(Qmsl_deval[i,t]) * ilogit(Qmsl_mont[i,t])
L_s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t] <- logit(s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t])

		bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t] = (1/3) * juv_vichy[i,t-3] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_vichy[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_vichy[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] = (1/3) * juv_alagnon[i,t-3] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_alagnon[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_alagnon[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t] = (1/3) * juv_langeac[i,t-3] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_langeac[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_langeac[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t] = (1/3) * juv_poutes[i,t-3] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_poutes[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_poutes[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_system[i,t] = bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t] +bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t]#*bugs_rho_poutes[i]
		
		ratio_juv_prod_A[i,t] <- bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] / (bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])	
		ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t] <- (bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t]) / (bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])	
		#ratio_juv_prod_V[i,t] <- 1-ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t]
		
		ratio_juv_A[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*(S_juv_JP[2,t]/(S_juv_JP[1,t]+S_juv_JP[2,t]+S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_A[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_A[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_A[i,t])
		L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_A[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_A[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_L_mont_P[i]*L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t] + bugs_beta_Q_L_mont_A[i]*L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t] #on met les nouveaux débits centrés-réduits calculé dans le chunk "simulation_q_identique"
		L_p_alagnon[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_alagnon[i]) 
		res_p_alagnon[i,t] <- L_p_alagnon[i,t]-L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t]
		
		ratio_juv_L[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*((S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t])/(S_juv_JP[1,t]+S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_L[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_L[i,t])
		L_mu_p_langeac[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_L[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_L[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_VB_mont_P[i]*L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t] + bugs_beta_Q_VB_mont_A[i]*L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]  #on met les nouveaux débits centrés-réduits calculé dans le chunk "simulation_q_identique"
		L_p_langeac[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_langeac[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_langeac[i]) 
		res_p_langeac[i,t] <- L_p_langeac[i,t]-L_mu_p_langeac[i,t]
		
		ratio_juv_prod_P[i,t] <-  bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t]/(bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])
		ratio_juv_P[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*(S_juv_JP[4,t]/(S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_P[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_P[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_P[i,t])
		L_mu_p_poutes[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_P[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_P[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_P_mont_P[i]*L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t] + bugs_beta_Q_P_mont_A[i]*L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]  #on met les nouveaux débits centrés-réduits calculé dans le chunk "simulation_q_identique"
	
		L_p_poutes[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_poutes[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_poutes[i]) 
		res_p_poutes[i,t] <- L_p_poutes[i,t]-L_mu_p_poutes[i,t]
		
		L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t]<- log(s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t]*bugs_juv_tot_system[i,t]) 
		N_vichy[i,t]<-rlnorm(1,L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t],bugs_sigma_vichy[i])
			if (N_vichy[i,t]<3) {N_vichy[i,t]=3}
			if (N_vichy[i,t]>15000) {N_vichy[i,t]=15000}#I(3,15000)
		res_vichy[i,t] <- log(N_vichy[i,t])-L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t]
		
		p_alagnon[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_alagnon[i,t])	
		p_langeac[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_langeac[i,t])	
		p_poutes[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_poutes[i,t])	
		N_alagnon[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_vichy[i,t],0),p_alagnon[i,t])
		N_langeac[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_vichy[i,t]-N_alagnon[i,t],0),p_langeac[i,t])
		N_poutes[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_langeac[i,t],0),p_poutes[i,t])
		min_N_langeac[i,t]<-N_poutes[i,t]+1
			if(N_langeac[i,t]<min_N_langeac[i,t]){N_langeac[i,t]=min_N_langeac[i,t]}
				
		S_poutes[i,t]=max(N_poutes[i,t],1)
		S_langeac[i,t]=max(N_langeac[i,t]-N_poutes[i,t],1)
		S_alagnon[i,t]=max(N_alagnon[i,t],1)
		S_vichy[i,t]= max(N_vichy[i,t]-N_alagnon[i,t]-N_langeac[i,t],1)
		
		L_mu_d_wild_vichy[i,t+1]=log( (S_vichy[i,t]/S_juv_JP[1,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_vichy[i,t]/S_juv_JP[1,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,1]
		L_d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_vichy[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_vichy[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_vichy[i,t+1]=d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[1,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_alagnon[i,t+1]=log( (S_alagnon[i,t]/S_juv_JP[2,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_alagnon[i,t]/S_juv_JP[2,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,2]
		L_d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_alagnon[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_alagnon[i,t+1]=d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[2,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_langeac[i,t+1]=log( (S_langeac[i,t]/S_juv_JP[3,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_langeac[i,t]/S_juv_JP[3,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,3]
		L_d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_langeac[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_langeac[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_langeac[i,t+1]=d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[3,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_poutes[i,t+1]=log( (S_poutes[i,t]/S_juv_JP[4,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_poutes[i,t]/S_juv_JP[4,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,4]
		L_d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_poutes[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_poutes[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_poutes[i,t+1]=d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[4,t+1]
		
	}
}

#Les juvéniles t-3 et t-4 sont maintenant ceux calculés à la fin des boucles précédentes et non plus ceux issus directement d'openbugs
for (t in (T+5):(T+5)){
	for (i in 1:iteration){ 

Qvb_deval[i,t] <- bugs_beta_Q_VB_deval[i]*L_Q_VB_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]
Qmsl_deval[i,t] <- bugs_beta_Q_MSL_deval[i]*L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]
Qmsl_mont[i,t] <- bugs_beta_Q_MSL_mont[i]*L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr_cr[i,t]
s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t] <- bugs_m_surv[i]* ilogit(Qvb_deval[i,t]) * ilogit(Qmsl_deval[i,t]) * ilogit(Qmsl_mont[i,t])
L_s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t] <- logit(s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t])

		bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t] = (1/3) * juv_vichy[i,t-3] + (1/3) * juv_vichy[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_vichy[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] = (1/3) * juv_alagnon[i,t-3] + (1/3) * juv_alagnon[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_alagnon[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t] = (1/3) * juv_langeac[i,t-3] + (1/3) * juv_langeac[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_langeac[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t] = (1/3) * juv_poutes[i,t-3] + (1/3) * juv_poutes[i,t-4] + (1/3) * bugs_juv_poutes[i,t-5] 
		bugs_juv_tot_system[i,t] = bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t] +bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t]#*bugs_rho_poutes[i]
		
		ratio_juv_prod_A[i,t] <- bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] / (bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_alagnon[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])	
		ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t] <- (bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t]) / (bugs_juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])	
		#ratio_juv_prod_V[i,t] <- 1-ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t]
		
		ratio_juv_A[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*(S_juv_JP[2,t]/(S_juv_JP[1,t]+S_juv_JP[2,t]+S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_A[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_A[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_A[i,t])
		L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_A[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_A[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_L_mont_P[i]*L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t] + bugs_beta_Q_L_mont_A[i]*L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t] #on met les nouveaux débits centrés-réduits calculé dans le chunk "simulation_q_identique"
		
		L_p_alagnon[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_alagnon[i]) 
		res_p_alagnon[i,t] <- L_p_alagnon[i,t]-L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t]
		
		ratio_juv_L[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*((S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t])/(S_juv_JP[1,t]+S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_L[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_L[i,t])
		L_mu_p_langeac[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_L[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_L[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_VB_mont_P[i]*L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t] + bugs_beta_Q_VB_mont_A[i]*L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]  #on met les nouveaux débits centrés-réduits calculé dans le chunk "simulation_q_identique"
		L_p_langeac[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_langeac[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_langeac[i]) 
		res_p_langeac[i,t] <- L_p_langeac[i,t]-L_mu_p_langeac[i,t]
		
		ratio_juv_prod_P[i,t] <-  bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t]/(bugs_juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+bugs_juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])
		ratio_juv_P[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*(S_juv_JP[4,t]/(S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_P[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_P[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_P[i,t])
		L_mu_p_poutes[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_P[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_P[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_P_mont_P[i]*L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t] + bugs_beta_Q_P_mont_A[i]*L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]  #on met les nouveaux débits centrés-réduits calculé dans le chunk "simulation_q_identique"
	
		L_p_poutes[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_poutes[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_poutes[i]) 
		res_p_poutes[i,t] <- L_p_poutes[i,t]-L_mu_p_poutes[i,t]
		
		L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t]<- log(s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t]*bugs_juv_tot_system[i,t]) 
		N_vichy[i,t]<-rlnorm(1,L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t],bugs_sigma_vichy[i])
			if (N_vichy[i,t]<3) {N_vichy[i,t]=3}
			if (N_vichy[i,t]>15000) {N_vichy[i,t]=15000}#I(3,15000)
		res_vichy[i,t] <- log(N_vichy[i,t])-L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t]
		
		p_alagnon[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_alagnon[i,t])	
		p_langeac[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_langeac[i,t])	
		p_poutes[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_poutes[i,t])	
		N_alagnon[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_vichy[i,t],0),p_alagnon[i,t])
		N_langeac[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_vichy[i,t]-N_alagnon[i,t],0),p_langeac[i,t])
		N_poutes[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_langeac[i,t],0),p_poutes[i,t])
		min_N_langeac[i,t]<-N_poutes[i,t]+1
			if(N_langeac[i,t]<min_N_langeac[i,t]){N_langeac[i,t]=min_N_langeac[i,t]}
		
		S_poutes[i,t]=max(N_poutes[i,t],1)
		S_langeac[i,t]=max(N_langeac[i,t]-N_poutes[i,t],1)
		S_alagnon[i,t]=max(N_alagnon[i,t],1)
		S_vichy[i,t]= max(N_vichy[i,t]-N_alagnon[i,t]-N_langeac[i,t],1)
		
		L_mu_d_wild_vichy[i,t+1]=log( (S_vichy[i,t]/S_juv_JP[1,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_vichy[i,t]/S_juv_JP[1,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,1]
		L_d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_vichy[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_vichy[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_vichy[i,t+1]=d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[1,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_alagnon[i,t+1]=log( (S_alagnon[i,t]/S_juv_JP[2,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_alagnon[i,t]/S_juv_JP[2,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,2]
		L_d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_alagnon[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_alagnon[i,t+1]=d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[2,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_langeac[i,t+1]=log( (S_langeac[i,t]/S_juv_JP[3,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_langeac[i,t]/S_juv_JP[3,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,3]
		L_d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_langeac[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_langeac[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_langeac[i,t+1]=d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[3,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_poutes[i,t+1]=log( (S_poutes[i,t]/S_juv_JP[4,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_poutes[i,t]/S_juv_JP[4,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,4]
		L_d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_poutes[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_poutes[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_poutes[i,t+1]=d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[4,t+1]
		
	}
}

#Les juvéniles t-3 et t-4 t-5 sont maintenant ceux calculés à la fin des boucles précédentes et non plus ceux issus directement d'openbugs
#On va jusqu'à T+21 pour pouvoir calculer renew_rate sur 20 ans (sinon manque une année car on a besoin de faire N_vichy[T+21]
for (t in (T+6):(T+20)){
	for (i in 1:iteration){ 

Qvb_deval[i,t] <- bugs_beta_Q_VB_deval[i]*L_Q_VB_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]
Qmsl_deval[i,t] <- bugs_beta_Q_MSL_deval[i]*L_Q_MSL_deval_20yr_cr[i,t]
Qmsl_mont[i,t] <- bugs_beta_Q_MSL_mont[i]*L_Q_MSL_mont_20yr_cr[i,t]
s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t] <- bugs_m_surv[i]* ilogit(Qvb_deval[i,t]) * ilogit(Qmsl_deval[i,t]) * ilogit(Qmsl_mont[i,t])
L_s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t] <- logit(s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t])

		juv_tot_vichy[i,t] = (1/3) * juv_vichy[i,t-3] + (1/3) * juv_vichy[i,t-4] + (1/3) * juv_vichy[i,t-5] 
		juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] = (1/3) * juv_alagnon[i,t-3] + (1/3) * juv_alagnon[i,t-4] + (1/3) * juv_alagnon[i,t-5] 
		juv_tot_langeac[i,t] = (1/3) * juv_langeac[i,t-3] + (1/3) * juv_langeac[i,t-4] + (1/3) * juv_langeac[i,t-5] 
		juv_tot_poutes[i,t] = (1/3) * juv_poutes[i,t-3] + (1/3) * juv_poutes[i,t-4] + (1/3) * juv_poutes[i,t-5] 
		juv_tot_system[i,t] = juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+juv_tot_alagnon[i,t]+juv_tot_langeac[i,t] +juv_tot_poutes[i,t]#*bugs_rho_poutes[i]
		
		ratio_juv_prod_A[i,t] <- juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] / (juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+juv_tot_alagnon[i,t]+juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])	
		ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t] <- (juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+juv_tot_poutes[i,t]) / (juv_tot_vichy[i,t]+juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])	
		#ratio_juv_prod_V[i,t] <- 1-ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t]
		
		ratio_juv_A[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*(S_juv_JP[2,t]/(S_juv_JP[1,t]+S_juv_JP[2,t]+S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_A[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_A[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_A[i,t])
		L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_A[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_A[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_L_mont_P[i]*L_Q_L_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t] + bugs_beta_Q_L_mont_A[i]*L_Q_L_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t] #on met les nouveaux débits centrés-réduits calculé dans le chunk "simulation_q_identique"
		
		L_p_alagnon[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_alagnon[i]) 
		res_p_alagnon[i,t] <- L_p_alagnon[i,t]-L_mu_p_alagnon[i,t]
				
		ratio_juv_L[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*((S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t])/(S_juv_JP[1,t]+S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_L[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_L[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_L[i,t])
		L_mu_p_langeac[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_L[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_L[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_VB_mont_P[i]*L_Q_VB_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t] + bugs_beta_Q_VB_mont_A[i]*L_Q_VB_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]  #on met les nouveaux débits centrés-réduits calculé dans le chunk "simulation_q_identique"
		L_p_langeac[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_langeac[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_langeac[i]) 
		res_p_langeac[i,t] <- L_p_langeac[i,t]-L_mu_p_langeac[i,t]
	
		ratio_juv_prod_P[i,t] <-  juv_tot_poutes[i,t]/(juv_tot_langeac[i,t]+juv_tot_poutes[i,t])#*bugs_rho_poutes[i])
		ratio_juv_P[i,t]<- bugs_rho_station[i]*(S_juv_JP[4,t]/(S_juv_JP[3,t]+S_juv_JP[4,t]))+(1-bugs_rho_station[i])*ratio_juv_prod_P[i,t]
		L_ratio_juv_P[i,t] <- logit(ratio_juv_P[i,t])
		L_mu_p_poutes[i,t]<-L_ratio_juv_P[i,t]+bugs_adjust_p_P[i]+ bugs_beta_Q_P_mont_P[i]*L_Q_P_mont_P_20yr_cr[i,t] + bugs_beta_Q_P_mont_A[i]*L_Q_P_mont_A_20yr_cr[i,t]  #on met les nouveaux débits centrés-réduits calculé dans le chunk "simulation_q_identique"
	
		L_p_poutes[i,t]<-rnorm(1,L_mu_p_poutes[i,t],bugs_sigma_p_poutes[i]) 
		res_p_poutes[i,t] <- L_p_poutes[i,t]-L_mu_p_poutes[i,t]
		
		L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t]<- log(s_juv2ad_20yr[i,t]*juv_tot_system[i,t]) 
		N_vichy[i,t]<-rlnorm(1,L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t],bugs_sigma_vichy[i])
			if (N_vichy[i,t]<3) {N_vichy[i,t]=3}
			if (N_vichy[i,t]>15000) {N_vichy[i,t]=15000}#I(3,15000)
		res_vichy[i,t] <- log(N_vichy[i,t])-L_mu_Vichy_nm[i,t]
		
		p_alagnon[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_alagnon[i,t])	
		p_langeac[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_langeac[i,t])	
		p_poutes[i,t]=inv.logit(L_p_poutes[i,t])	
		N_alagnon[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_vichy[i,t],0),p_alagnon[i,t])
		N_langeac[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_vichy[i,t]-N_alagnon[i,t],0),p_langeac[i,t])
		N_poutes[i,t]=rbinom(1,round(N_langeac[i,t],0),p_poutes[i,t])
		min_N_langeac[i,t]<-N_poutes[i,t]+1
			if(N_langeac[i,t]<min_N_langeac[i,t]){N_langeac[i,t]=min_N_langeac[i,t]}
				
		
		S_poutes[i,t]=max(N_poutes[i,t],1)
		S_langeac[i,t]=max(N_langeac[i,t]-N_poutes[i,t],1)
		S_alagnon[i,t]=max(N_alagnon[i,t],1)
		S_vichy[i,t]= max(N_vichy[i,t]-N_alagnon[i,t]-N_langeac[i,t],1)
		
		L_mu_d_wild_vichy[i,t+1]=log( (S_vichy[i,t]/S_juv_JP[1,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_vichy[i,t]/S_juv_JP[1,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,1]
		L_d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_vichy[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_vichy[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_vichy[i,t+1]=d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[1,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_alagnon[i,t+1]=log( (S_alagnon[i,t]/S_juv_JP[2,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_alagnon[i,t]/S_juv_JP[2,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,2]
		L_d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_alagnon[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_alagnon[i,t+1]=d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[2,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_langeac[i,t+1]=log( (S_langeac[i,t]/S_juv_JP[3,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_langeac[i,t]/S_juv_JP[3,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,3]
		L_d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_langeac[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_langeac[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_langeac[i,t+1]=d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[3,t+1]
		
		L_mu_d_wild_poutes[i,t+1]=log( (S_poutes[i,t]/S_juv_JP[4,t]) / (bugs_alpha_dd[i] + bugs_beta_dd[i] * (S_poutes[i,t]/S_juv_JP[4,t]) )) + bugs_nu_d[i,4]
		L_d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]=rnorm(1,L_mu_d_wild_poutes[i,t+1],bugs_sigma_wild_moy[i])
		d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]=exp(L_d_moy_poutes[i,t+1])#d_moy_vichy=d_wild_moy_vichy car projection sans repeuplement
		juv_poutes[i,t+1]=d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[4,t+1]
		
	}
}

```


```{r save_calcul, eval=FALSE, echo=FALSE}

save.image(file =str_c( here::here("2023_05_Projection_WithoutStocking_Sensibilite_evolution_"),type_mod,"_",scenario,"_2023_09_22.RData"))
save(N_vichy,file =str_c( here::here("2023_05_N_vichy_Projection_WithoutStocking_Sensibilite_evolution_"),type_mod,"_",scenario,"_2023_09_22.RData"))
```

```{r graph_proj_20yr_avec_distri_melange,eval=FALSE,echo=FALSE}
#..............................
# PROJECTION SUR LES 20 ANS 
#..............................

# Graph projection 20 years
bugs_N_vichy_real=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"simulation/N_vichy_realCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"simulation/N_vichy_realCODAindex.txt"))
N_vichy_real_q=array(NA,dim=c(30,5)) #30 car 22 ans sans STACOMI Vichy puis une année non exhaustive la 30eme années

#Attention à l'année 30 estimation des passages Vichy car année jugée incomplète
for (t in 1:22){
	N_vichy_real_q[t,]=quantile(bugs_N_vichy_real[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
}
for(t in 23:23){
	N_vichy_real_q[(t+7),]=quantile(bugs_N_vichy_real[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
}

#N_vichy_proj_q=array(0,dim=c(43,5))
N_vichy_proj_q=array(0,dim=c(T+20,5))
for (t in (T+1):(T+20)){
	N_vichy_proj_q[t,]=quantile(N_vichy[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
}

#..........
# Graph
#..........



png(filename=str_c(here::here("img/Simulation/2023_05/2_Model_melange_homogenisation_Q_printemps/TotalReturns_WithoutStocking_SensibiliteModel_"),scenario,"_withModelMelange_2023_08_31.png"),width=800,height=800)


plot(1,1,type="n",axes=FALSE,xlim=c(0.5,T+20+0.5),xlab="années",ylim=c(0,9000),ylab="Retours à Vichy",main=str_c("Projection sans repeuplement dans le scenario de débit : ",scenario),cex.lab=1.2)

# trace l'axe des ordonnées
axis(2,at = c(0,1000,2000,3000,4000,5000,6000,7000,8000,9000),labels=c(0,1000,2000,3000,4000,5000,6000,7000,8000,9000),cex.axis = 1,las = 1,lwd=2,col = "black")
# trace l'axe des abscisses
lab1=c(1975,1980,1990,2000,1974+T,1974+T+10,1974+T+20)
axis(1,at = c(1,6,16,26,T,T+10,T+20),
		labels=lab1,
		cex.axis = 1,las = 1,lwd=2,col = "black")


for(i in 3:30){
	#whiskers
	#95%
	segments(i-0.15,N_vichy_real_q[i,5],i+0.15,N_vichy_real_q[i,5])
	segments(i,N_vichy_real_q[i,4],i,N_vichy_real_q[i,5])
	#5%
	segments(i-0.15,N_vichy_real_q[i,1],i+0.15,N_vichy_real_q[i,1])
	segments(i,N_vichy_real_q[i,2],i,N_vichy_real_q[i,1])
	#boxplot
	polygon(c(i-0.3,i+0.3,i+0.3,i-0.3),c(N_vichy_real_q[i,2],N_vichy_real_q[i,2],N_vichy_real_q[i,4],N_vichy_real_q[i,4]),col="light grey")
	#median
	segments(i-0.3,N_vichy_real_q[i,3],i+0.3,N_vichy_real_q[i,3])
}

source(str_c(datawd,"data.R"))
data_vichy<-N[,1]

points(x=seq(23,T,1),data_vichy[23:T],pch=16)

for(i in (T+1):(T+20)){
	#whiskers
	#95%
	segments(i-0.15,N_vichy_proj_q[i,5],i+0.15,N_vichy_proj_q[i,5])
	segments(i,N_vichy_proj_q[i,4],i,N_vichy_proj_q[i,5])
	#5%
	segments(i-0.15,N_vichy_proj_q[i,1],i+0.15,N_vichy_proj_q[i,1])
	segments(i,N_vichy_proj_q[i,2],i,N_vichy_proj_q[i,1])
	#boxplot
	polygon(c(i-0.3,i+0.3,i+0.3,i-0.3),c(N_vichy_proj_q[i,2],N_vichy_proj_q[i,2],N_vichy_proj_q[i,4],N_vichy_proj_q[i,4]),col="orange")
	#median
	segments(i-0.3,N_vichy_proj_q[i,3],i+0.3,N_vichy_proj_q[i,3])
}


dev.off()


```
```{r graph_threshold_avec_distri_melange,eval=FALSE,echo=FALSE}


under_50_vichy=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_100_vichy=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_250_vichy=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_500_vichy=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))

p_under_50_vichy=rep(NA,20)
p_under_100_vichy=rep(NA,20)
p_under_250_vichy=rep(NA,20)
p_under_500_vichy=rep(NA,20)


for (t in (T+1):(T+20)){
	
	for (i in 1:iteration){
		if(N_vichy[i,t] < 50){under_50_vichy[i,t-T]=1} else{under_50_vichy[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy[i,t] < 100){under_100_vichy[i,t-T]=1}else{under_100_vichy[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy[i,t] < 250){under_250_vichy[i,t-T]=1}else{under_250_vichy[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy[i,t] < 500){under_500_vichy[i,t-T]=1}else{under_500_vichy[i,t-T]=0}
	}
}


for (t in 1:20){
	p_under_50_vichy[t]=mean(under_50_vichy[,t])
	p_under_100_vichy[t]=mean(under_100_vichy[,t])
	p_under_250_vichy[t]=mean(under_250_vichy[,t])
	p_under_500_vichy[t]=mean(under_500_vichy[,t])

}

#..............
# Graph
#..............
png(filename=str_c(here::here("img/Simulation/2023_05/2_Model_melange_homogenisation_Q_printemps/Threshold_"),scenario,"_",type_mod,"_2023_08_31.png"),width=800,height=800)

par(mfrow=c(1,1),mar=c(4,6.1,2,0.5),cex.lab=1.4, cex.lab=1.4)

plot(1,1,type="n",axes=FALSE,xlim=c(0.5,20.5),xlab="années",ylim=c(0,1),ylab=expression(italic(p^seuils)),cex.lab=1.5) #expression(italic(p^seuils))
# trace l'axe des ordonnées
axis(2,at = c(0,0.2,0.4,0.6,0.8,1),labels=c(0,0.2,0.4,0.6,0.8,1),cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "black")
# trace l'axe des abscisses
lab2=c(1975+T,1975+T+9,1975+T+19)
axis(1,at = c(1,10,20),
		labels=lab2,
		cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "black")

x=seq(1,20,1)
color<-ifelse(scenario=="sans_Q","blue",
              ifelse(scenario=="identique","green",
                     ifelse(scenario=="diminue_5","orange",
                            ifelse(scenario=="diminue_10","red",""))))
#points(x,p_under_50_vichy_sans_Q,col="grey75",pch=16)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_50_vichy[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_50_vichy[2:20],col=color,lwd=2)

segments(x[1:19],p_under_100_vichy[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_100_vichy[2:20],col=color,lwd=2,lty=2)

segments(x[1:19],p_under_250_vichy[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_250_vichy[2:20],col=color,lwd=2,lty=3)

segments(x[1:19],p_under_500_vichy[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_500_vichy[2:20],col=color,lwd=2,lty=4)


legend("topleft",
       legend=c(expression(p^seuils < 500),expression(p^seuils < 250),expression(p^seuils < 100),expression(p^seuils < 50)),
		    lty=c(4,3,2,1),#16),
	    	col=rep(color,4), #,"grey75","grey85"),
	    	bty="n")
	#	horiz = TRUE)


dev.off()

```

```{r graph_threshold_compare_avec_ss_distri_melange,eval=FALSE,echo=FALSE}
#sans_Q
load(file=here::here("2023_05_N_vichy_Projection_WithoutStocking_Sensibilite_evolution_ModelMelange_sans_Q_2023_08_31.RData"))
N_vichy_av_melange<-N_vichy
rm(N_vichy)
#SS_model_melange
load(file =here::here("2023_05_N_vichy_Projection_WithoutStocking_Sensibilite_evolution_WithoutModelMelange_sans_Q_2023_08_31.RData"))
N_vichy_ss_melange<-N_vichy
rm(N_vichy)

#identique
load(file=here::here("2023_05_N_vichy_Projection_WithoutStocking_Sensibilite_evolution_ModelMelange_identique_2023_08_31.RData"))
N_vichy_av_melange<-N_vichy
rm(N_vichy)
#SS_model_melange
load(file =here::here("2023_05_N_vichy_Projection_WithoutStocking_Sensibilite_evolution_WithoutModelMelange_identique_2023_08_31.RData"))
N_vichy_ss_melange<-N_vichy
rm(N_vichy)

#diminue_5
load(file=here::here("2023_05_N_vichy_Projection_WithoutStocking_Sensibilite_evolution_ModelMelange_diminue_5_2023_08_31.RData"))
N_vichy_av_melange<-N_vichy
rm(N_vichy)
#SS_model_melange
load(file =here::here("2023_05_N_vichy_Projection_WithoutStocking_Sensibilite_evolution_WithoutModelMelange_diminue_5_2023_08_31.RData"))
N_vichy_ss_melange<-N_vichy
rm(N_vichy)

#diminue_10
load(file=here::here("2023_05_N_vichy_Projection_WithoutStocking_Sensibilite_evolution_ModelMelange_diminue_10_2023_08_31.RData"))
N_vichy_av_melange<-N_vichy
rm(N_vichy)
#SS_model_melange
load(file =here::here("2023_05_N_vichy_Projection_WithoutStocking_Sensibilite_evolution_WithoutModelMelange_diminue_10_2023_08_31.RData"))
N_vichy_ss_melange<-N_vichy
rm(N_vichy)

under_50_vichy=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_100_vichy=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_250_vichy=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_500_vichy=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
p_under_50_vichy=rep(NA,20)
p_under_100_vichy=rep(NA,20)
p_under_250_vichy=rep(NA,20)
p_under_500_vichy=rep(NA,20)

under_50_vichy_ss_melange=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_100_vichy_ss_melange=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_250_vichy_ss_melange=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_500_vichy_ss_melange=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
p_under_50_vichy_ss_melange=rep(NA,20)
p_under_100_vichy_ss_melange=rep(NA,20)
p_under_250_vichy_ss_melange=rep(NA,20)
p_under_500_vichy_ss_melange=rep(NA,20)


for (t in (T+1):(T+20)){
	
	for (i in 1:iteration){
		if(N_vichy_av_melange[i,t] < 50){under_50_vichy[i,t-T]=1} else{under_50_vichy[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_av_melange[i,t] < 100){under_100_vichy[i,t-T]=1}else{under_100_vichy[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_av_melange[i,t] < 250){under_250_vichy[i,t-T]=1}else{under_250_vichy[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_av_melange[i,t] < 500){under_500_vichy[i,t-T]=1}else{under_500_vichy[i,t-T]=0}
	  
	  if(N_vichy_ss_melange[i,t] < 50){under_50_vichy_ss_melange[i,t-T]=1} else{under_50_vichy_ss_melange[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_ss_melange[i,t] < 100){under_100_vichy_ss_melange[i,t-T]=1}else{under_100_vichy_ss_melange[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_ss_melange[i,t] < 250){under_250_vichy_ss_melange[i,t-T]=1}else{under_250_vichy_ss_melange[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_ss_melange[i,t] < 500){under_500_vichy_ss_melange[i,t-T]=1}else{under_500_vichy_ss_melange[i,t-T]=0}
	}
}


for (t in 1:20){
	p_under_50_vichy[t]=mean(under_50_vichy[,t])
	p_under_100_vichy[t]=mean(under_100_vichy[,t])
	p_under_250_vichy[t]=mean(under_250_vichy[,t])
	p_under_500_vichy[t]=mean(under_500_vichy[,t])
	
	p_under_50_vichy_ss_melange[t]=mean(under_50_vichy_ss_melange[,t])
	p_under_100_vichy_ss_melange[t]=mean(under_100_vichy_ss_melange[,t])
	p_under_250_vichy_ss_melange[t]=mean(under_250_vichy_ss_melange[,t])
	p_under_500_vichy_ss_melange[t]=mean(under_500_vichy_ss_melange[,t])

}

scenario<-"diminue_10"  #choisir dans "sans_Q" / "identique" / "diminue_5" / "diminue_10"
#..............
# Graph
#..............
png(filename=str_c(here::here("img/Simulation/2023_05/Threshold_"),scenario,"_compare_With_Without_Melange_2023_09_01.png"),width=800,height=800)

par(mfrow=c(1,1),mar=c(4,6.1,2,0.5),cex.lab=1.4, cex.lab=1.4)

plot(1,1,type="n",axes=FALSE,xlim=c(0.5,20.5),xlab="années",ylim=c(0,1),ylab=expression(italic(p^seuils)),cex.lab=1.5) #expression(italic(p^seuils))
# trace l'axe des ordonnées
axis(2,at = c(0,0.2,0.4,0.6,0.8,1),labels=c(0,0.2,0.4,0.6,0.8,1),cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "black")
# trace l'axe des abscisses
lab2=c(1975+T,1975+T+9,1975+T+19)
axis(1,at = c(1,10,20),
		labels=lab2,
		cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "black")

x=seq(1,20,1)

#points(x,p_under_50_vichy_sans_Q,col="grey75",pch=16)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_50_vichy[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_50_vichy[2:20],col="blue",lwd=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_100_vichy[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_100_vichy[2:20],col="blue",lwd=2,lty=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_250_vichy[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_250_vichy[2:20],col="blue",lwd=2,lty=3)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_500_vichy[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_500_vichy[2:20],col="blue",lwd=2,lty=4)

segments(x[1:19],p_under_50_vichy_ss_melange[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_50_vichy_ss_melange[2:20],col="green",lwd=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_100_vichy_ss_melange[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_100_vichy_ss_melange[2:20],col="green",lwd=2,lty=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_250_vichy_ss_melange[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_250_vichy_ss_melange[2:20],col="green",lwd=2,lty=3)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_500_vichy_ss_melange[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_500_vichy_ss_melange[2:20],col="green",lwd=2,lty=4)


legend("topleft",
       legend=c(expression(p^seuils < 500),expression(p^seuils < 250),expression(p^seuils < 100),expression(p^seuils < 50),"Avec Mélange","Sans Mélange"),
		    lty=c(4,3,2,1,NA,NA),#16),
       pch=c(NA,NA,NA,NA,16,16),
	    	col=c(rep("black",4),"blue","green"), #,"grey75","grey85"),
	    	bty="n")
	#	horiz = TRUE)


dev.off()

```

```{r graph_threshold_compare_scenario_avec_distri_melange,eval=FALSE,echo=FALSE}
library(stringr)
iteration=10000
T=48
type_mod="ModelMelange"

#On charge les différents N_Vichy
load(here::here("2023_05_N_vichy_Projection_WithoutStocking_Sensibilite_evolution_ModelMelange_sans_Q_2023_08_31.RData"))
N_vichy_sans_Q<-N_vichy
rm(N_vichy)

under_10_vichy_sans_Q=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_50_vichy_sans_Q=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_100_vichy_sans_Q=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_250_vichy_sans_Q=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_500_vichy_sans_Q=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))

p_under_10_vichy_sans_Q=rep(NA,20)
p_under_50_vichy_sans_Q=rep(NA,20)
p_under_100_vichy_sans_Q=rep(NA,20)
p_under_250_vichy_sans_Q=rep(NA,20)
p_under_500_vichy_sans_Q=rep(NA,20)

#identique
load(here::here("2023_05_N_vichy_Projection_WithoutStocking_Sensibilite_evolution_ModelMelange_identique_2023_08_31.RData"))
N_vichy_Q_identique<-N_vichy
rm(N_vichy)

under_10_vichy_Q_identique=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_50_vichy_Q_identique=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_100_vichy_Q_identique=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_250_vichy_Q_identique=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_500_vichy_Q_identique=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))

p_under_10_vichy_Q_identique=rep(NA,20)
p_under_50_vichy_Q_identique=rep(NA,20)
p_under_100_vichy_Q_identique=rep(NA,20)
p_under_250_vichy_Q_identique=rep(NA,20)
p_under_500_vichy_Q_identique=rep(NA,20)

#diminue_5
load(file = here::here("2023_05_N_vichy_Projection_WithoutStocking_Sensibilite_evolution_ModelMelange_diminue_5_2023_08_31.RData"))  
N_vichy_diminue_5<-N_vichy
rm(N_vichy)

under_10_vichy_diminue_5=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_50_vichy_diminue_5=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_100_vichy_diminue_5=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_250_vichy_diminue_5=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_500_vichy_diminue_5=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))

p_under_10_vichy_diminue_5=rep(NA,20)
p_under_50_vichy_diminue_5=rep(NA,20)
p_under_100_vichy_diminue_5=rep(NA,20)
p_under_250_vichy_diminue_5=rep(NA,20)
p_under_500_vichy_diminue_5=rep(NA,20)

#diminue_10
load(file = here::here("2023_05_N_vichy_Projection_WithoutStocking_Sensibilite_evolution_ModelMelange_diminue_10_2023_08_31.RData"))
N_vichy_diminue_10<-N_vichy
rm(N_vichy)

under_50_vichy_diminue_10=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_100_vichy_diminue_10=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_250_vichy_diminue_10=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_500_vichy_diminue_10=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))

p_under_50_vichy_diminue_10=rep(NA,20)
p_under_100_vichy_diminue_10=rep(NA,20)
p_under_250_vichy_diminue_10=rep(NA,20)
p_under_500_vichy_diminue_10=rep(NA,20)


for (t in (T+1):(T+20)){
	
	for (i in 1:iteration){
		if(N_vichy_sans_Q[i,t] < 50){under_50_vichy_sans_Q[i,t-T]=1} else{under_50_vichy_sans_Q[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_sans_Q[i,t] < 100){under_100_vichy_sans_Q[i,t-T]=1}else{under_100_vichy_sans_Q[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_sans_Q[i,t] < 250){under_250_vichy_sans_Q[i,t-T]=1}else{under_250_vichy_sans_Q[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_sans_Q[i,t] < 500){under_500_vichy_sans_Q[i,t-T]=1}else{under_500_vichy_sans_Q[i,t-T]=0}
	  #identique
	  if(N_vichy_Q_identique[i,t] < 50){under_50_vichy_Q_identique[i,t-T]=1} else{under_50_vichy_Q_identique[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_Q_identique[i,t] < 100){under_100_vichy_Q_identique[i,t-T]=1}else{under_100_vichy_Q_identique[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_Q_identique[i,t] < 250){under_250_vichy_Q_identique[i,t-T]=1}else{under_250_vichy_Q_identique[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_Q_identique[i,t] < 500){under_500_vichy_Q_identique[i,t-T]=1}else{under_500_vichy_Q_identique[i,t-T]=0}
	  #diminue5
	 	if(N_vichy_diminue_5[i,t] < 50){under_50_vichy_diminue_5[i,t-T]=1} else{under_50_vichy_diminue_5[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_diminue_5[i,t] < 100){under_100_vichy_diminue_5[i,t-T]=1}else{under_100_vichy_diminue_5[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_diminue_5[i,t] < 250){under_250_vichy_diminue_5[i,t-T]=1}else{under_250_vichy_diminue_5[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_diminue_5[i,t] < 500){under_500_vichy_diminue_5[i,t-T]=1}else{under_500_vichy_diminue_5[i,t-T]=0}
	  #diminue10
	  if(N_vichy_diminue_10[i,t] < 50){under_50_vichy_diminue_10[i,t-T]=1} else{under_50_vichy_diminue_10[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_diminue_10[i,t] < 100){under_100_vichy_diminue_10[i,t-T]=1}else{under_100_vichy_diminue_10[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_diminue_10[i,t] < 250){under_250_vichy_diminue_10[i,t-T]=1}else{under_250_vichy_diminue_10[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_diminue_10[i,t] < 500){under_500_vichy_diminue_10[i,t-T]=1}else{under_500_vichy_diminue_10[i,t-T]=0}
	}
}


for (t in 1:20){
	p_under_50_vichy_sans_Q[t]=mean(under_50_vichy_sans_Q[,t])
	p_under_100_vichy_sans_Q[t]=mean(under_100_vichy_sans_Q[,t])
	p_under_250_vichy_sans_Q[t]=mean(under_250_vichy_sans_Q[,t])
	p_under_500_vichy_sans_Q[t]=mean(under_500_vichy_sans_Q[,t])
	#identique
	p_under_50_vichy_Q_identique[t]=mean(under_50_vichy_Q_identique[,t])
	p_under_100_vichy_Q_identique[t]=mean(under_100_vichy_Q_identique[,t])
	p_under_250_vichy_Q_identique[t]=mean(under_250_vichy_Q_identique[,t])
	p_under_500_vichy_Q_identique[t]=mean(under_500_vichy_Q_identique[,t])
	#diminue5
	p_under_50_vichy_diminue_5[t]=mean(under_50_vichy_diminue_5[,t])
	p_under_100_vichy_diminue_5[t]=mean(under_100_vichy_diminue_5[,t])
	p_under_250_vichy_diminue_5[t]=mean(under_250_vichy_diminue_5[,t])
	p_under_500_vichy_diminue_5[t]=mean(under_500_vichy_diminue_5[,t])
	#diminue10
	p_under_50_vichy_diminue_10[t]=mean(under_50_vichy_diminue_10[,t])
	p_under_100_vichy_diminue_10[t]=mean(under_100_vichy_diminue_10[,t])
	p_under_250_vichy_diminue_10[t]=mean(under_250_vichy_diminue_10[,t])
	p_under_500_vichy_diminue_10[t]=mean(under_500_vichy_diminue_10[,t])
	
}

#..............
# Graph
#..............
png(filename=str_c(here::here("img/Simulation/2023_05/2_Model_melange_homogenisation_Q_printemps/Threshold_50_compare_scenario"),"_",type_mod,"_2023_09_01.png"),width=800,height=800)

par(mfrow=c(1,1),mar=c(4,6.1,2,0.5),cex.lab=1.4, cex.lab=1.4)

plot(1,1,type="n",axes=FALSE,xlim=c(0.5,20.5),xlab="années",ylim=c(0,1),ylab=expression(italic(p^seuils)< 50),cex.lab=1.5) #expression(italic(p^seuils))
# trace l'axe des ordonnées
axis(2,at = c(0,0.2,0.4,0.6,0.8,1),labels=c(0,0.2,0.4,0.6,0.8,1),cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "black")
# trace l'axe des abscisses
lab2=c(1975+T,1975+T+9,1975+T+19)
axis(1,at = c(1,10,20),
		labels=lab2,
		cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "black")

x=seq(1,20,1)

#points(x,p_under_50_vichy_sans_Q,col="grey75",pch=16)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_50_vichy_sans_Q[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_50_vichy_sans_Q[2:20],col="blue",lwd=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_50_vichy_Q_identique[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_50_vichy_Q_identique[2:20],col="green",lwd=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_50_vichy_diminue_5[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_50_vichy_diminue_5[2:20],col="orange",lwd=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_50_vichy_diminue_10[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_50_vichy_diminue_10[2:20],col="red",lwd=2)

legend("topleft",title=expression(p^seuils < 50),
       legend=c("sans_q","identique","diminue_5","diminue_10"),#,expression(p^seuils < 10)),
		    lty=c(1,1,1,1),#16),
	    	col=c("blue","green","orange","red"), #,"grey75","grey85"),
	    	bty="n")
	#	horiz = TRUE)


dev.off()


png(filename=str_c(here::here("img/Simulation/2023_05/2_Model_melange_homogenisation_Q_printemps/Threshold_100_compare_scenario"),"_",type_mod,"_2023_09_01.png"),width=800,height=800)

par(mfrow=c(1,1),mar=c(4,6.1,2,0.5),cex.lab=1.4, cex.lab=1.4)

plot(1,1,type="n",axes=FALSE,xlim=c(0.5,20.5),xlab="années",ylim=c(0,1),ylab=expression(italic(p^seuils)< 100),cex.lab=1.5) #expression(italic(p^seuils))
# trace l'axe des ordonnées
axis(2,at = c(0,0.2,0.4,0.6,0.8,1),labels=c(0,0.2,0.4,0.6,0.8,1),cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "black")
# trace l'axe des abscisses
lab2=c(1975+T,1975+T+9,1975+T+19)
axis(1,at = c(1,10,20),
		labels=lab2,
		cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "black")

x=seq(1,20,1)
#points(x,p_under_100_vichy_sans_Q,col="grey65",pch=16)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_100_vichy_sans_Q[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_100_vichy_sans_Q[2:20],col="blue",lwd=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_100_vichy_Q_identique[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_100_vichy_Q_identique[2:20],col="green",lwd=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_100_vichy_diminue_5[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_100_vichy_diminue_5[2:20],col="orange",lwd=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_100_vichy_diminue_10[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_100_vichy_diminue_10[2:20],col="red",lwd=2)

legend("topleft",title=expression(p^seuils < 100),
       legend=c("sans_q","identique","diminue_5","diminue_10"),#,expression(p^seuils < 10)),
		    lty=c(1,1,1,1),#16),
	    	col=c("blue","green","orange","red"), #,"grey75","grey85"),
	    	bty="n")
	#	horiz = TRUE)


dev.off()

png(filename=str_c(here::here("img/Simulation/2023_05/2_Model_melange_homogenisation_Q_printemps/Threshold_250_compare_scenario"),"_",type_mod,"_2023_09_01.png"),width=800,height=800)

par(mfrow=c(1,1),mar=c(4,6.1,2,0.5),cex.lab=1.4, cex.lab=1.4)

plot(1,1,type="n",axes=FALSE,xlim=c(0.5,20.5),xlab="années",ylim=c(0,1),ylab=expression(italic(p^seuils)< 250),cex.lab=1.5) #expression(italic(p^seuils))
# trace l'axe des ordonnées
axis(2,at = c(0,0.2,0.4,0.6,0.8,1),labels=c(0,0.2,0.4,0.6,0.8,1),cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "black")
# trace l'axe des abscisses
lab2=c(1975+T,1975+T+9,1975+T+19)
axis(1,at = c(1,10,20),
		labels=lab2,
		cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "black")

x=seq(1,20,1)
#points(x,p_under_250_vichy_sans_Q,col="grey55",pch=16)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_250_vichy_sans_Q[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_250_vichy_sans_Q[2:20],col="blue",lwd=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_250_vichy_Q_identique[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_250_vichy_Q_identique[2:20],col="green",lwd=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_250_vichy_diminue_5[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_250_vichy_diminue_5[2:20],col="orange",lwd=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_250_vichy_diminue_10[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_250_vichy_diminue_10[2:20],col="red",lwd=2)

legend("topleft",title=expression(p^seuils < 250),
       legend=c("sans_q","identique","diminue_5","diminue_10"),#,expression(p^seuils < 10)),
		    lty=c(1,1,1,1),#16),
	    	col=c("blue","green","orange","red"), #,"grey75","grey85"),
	    	bty="n")
	#	horiz = TRUE)


dev.off()

png(filename=str_c(here::here("img/Simulation/2023_05/2_Model_melange_homogenisation_Q_printemps/Threshold_500_compare_scenario"),"_",type_mod,"_2023_09_01.png"),width=800,height=800)

par(mfrow=c(1,1),mar=c(4,6.1,2,0.5),cex.lab=1.4, cex.lab=1.4)

plot(1,1,type="n",axes=FALSE,xlim=c(0.5,20.5),xlab="années",ylim=c(0,1),ylab=expression(italic(p^seuils)< 500),cex.lab=1.5) #expression(italic(p^seuils))
# trace l'axe des ordonnées
axis(2,at = c(0,0.2,0.4,0.6,0.8,1),labels=c(0,0.2,0.4,0.6,0.8,1),cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "black")
# trace l'axe des abscisses
lab2=c(1975+T,1975+T+9,1975+T+19)
axis(1,at = c(1,10,20),
		labels=lab2,
		cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "black")

x=seq(1,20,1)
#points(x,p_under_500_vichy_sans_Q,col="grey45",pch=16)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_500_vichy_sans_Q[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_500_vichy_sans_Q[2:20],col="blue",lwd=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_500_vichy_Q_identique[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_500_vichy_Q_identique[2:20],col="green",lwd=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_500_vichy_diminue_5[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_500_vichy_diminue_5[2:20],col="orange",lwd=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_500_vichy_diminue_10[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_500_vichy_diminue_10[2:20],col="red",lwd=2)

legend("topleft",title=expression(p^seuils < 500),
       legend=c("sans_q","identique","diminue_5","diminue_10"),#,expression(p^seuils < 10)),
		    lty=c(1,1,1,1),#16),
	    	col=c("blue","green","orange","red"), #,"grey75","grey85"),
	    	bty="n")
	#	horiz = TRUE)


dev.off()

```

```{r graph_proj_20yr_ss_distri_melange,eval=FALSE,echo=FALSE}
#..............................
# PROJECTION SUR LES 20 ANS 
#..............................

# Graph projection 20 years
bugs_N_vichy_real=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"simulation/N_vichy_realCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"simulation/N_vichy_realCODAindex.txt"))
N_vichy_real_q=array(NA,dim=c(30,5)) #30 car 22 ans sans STACOMI Vichy puis une année non exhaustive la 30eme années

#Attention à l'année 30 estimation des passages Vichy car année jugée incomplète
for (t in 1:22){
	N_vichy_real_q[t,]=quantile(bugs_N_vichy_real[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
}
for(t in 23:23){
	N_vichy_real_q[(t+7),]=quantile(bugs_N_vichy_real[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
}

#N_vichy_proj_q=array(0,dim=c(43,5))
N_vichy_proj_q=array(0,dim=c(T+20,5))
for (t in (T+1):(T+20)){
	N_vichy_proj_q[t,]=quantile(N_vichy[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
}

#..........
# Graph
#..........



png(filename=str_c(here::here("img/Simulation/2023_05/3_Model_sans_distribution_melange/TotalReturns_WithoutStocking_Sensibilite_"),scenario,"_",type_mod,"_2023_09_22.png"),width=800,height=800)


plot(1,1,type="n",axes=FALSE,xlim=c(0.5,T+20+0.5),xlab="années",ylim=c(0,9000),ylab="Retours à Vichy",main=str_c("Projection sans repeuplement dans le scenario de débit : ",scenario),cex.lab=1.2)

# trace l'axe des ordonnées
axis(2,at = c(0,1000,2000,3000,4000,5000,6000,7000,8000,9000),labels=c(0,1000,2000,3000,4000,5000,6000,7000,8000,9000),cex.axis = 1,las = 1,lwd=2,col = "black")
# trace l'axe des abscisses
lab1=c(1975,1980,1990,2000,1974+T,1974+T+10,1974+T+20)
axis(1,at = c(1,6,16,26,T,T+10,T+20),
		labels=lab1,
		cex.axis = 1,las = 1,lwd=2,col = "black")


for(i in 3:30){
	#whiskers
	#95%
	segments(i-0.15,N_vichy_real_q[i,5],i+0.15,N_vichy_real_q[i,5])
	segments(i,N_vichy_real_q[i,4],i,N_vichy_real_q[i,5])
	#5%
	segments(i-0.15,N_vichy_real_q[i,1],i+0.15,N_vichy_real_q[i,1])
	segments(i,N_vichy_real_q[i,2],i,N_vichy_real_q[i,1])
	#boxplot
	polygon(c(i-0.3,i+0.3,i+0.3,i-0.3),c(N_vichy_real_q[i,2],N_vichy_real_q[i,2],N_vichy_real_q[i,4],N_vichy_real_q[i,4]),col="light grey")
	#median
	segments(i-0.3,N_vichy_real_q[i,3],i+0.3,N_vichy_real_q[i,3])
}

source(str_c(datawd,"data.R"))
data_vichy<-N[,1]

points(x=seq(23,T,1),data_vichy[23:T],pch=16)

for(i in (T+1):(T+20)){
	#whiskers
	#95%
	segments(i-0.15,N_vichy_proj_q[i,5],i+0.15,N_vichy_proj_q[i,5])
	segments(i,N_vichy_proj_q[i,4],i,N_vichy_proj_q[i,5])
	#5%
	segments(i-0.15,N_vichy_proj_q[i,1],i+0.15,N_vichy_proj_q[i,1])
	segments(i,N_vichy_proj_q[i,2],i,N_vichy_proj_q[i,1])
	#boxplot
	polygon(c(i-0.3,i+0.3,i+0.3,i-0.3),c(N_vichy_proj_q[i,2],N_vichy_proj_q[i,2],N_vichy_proj_q[i,4],N_vichy_proj_q[i,4]),col="orange")
	#median
	segments(i-0.3,N_vichy_proj_q[i,3],i+0.3,N_vichy_proj_q[i,3])
}


dev.off()

```
```{r graph_threshold_ss_distri_melange,eval=FALSE,echo=FALSE}


under_50_vichy=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_100_vichy=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_250_vichy=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_500_vichy=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))

p_under_50_vichy=rep(NA,20)
p_under_100_vichy=rep(NA,20)
p_under_250_vichy=rep(NA,20)
p_under_500_vichy=rep(NA,20)


for (t in (T+1):(T+20)){
	
	for (i in 1:iteration){
		if(N_vichy[i,t] < 50){under_50_vichy[i,t-T]=1} else{under_50_vichy[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy[i,t] < 100){under_100_vichy[i,t-T]=1}else{under_100_vichy[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy[i,t] < 250){under_250_vichy[i,t-T]=1}else{under_250_vichy[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy[i,t] < 500){under_500_vichy[i,t-T]=1}else{under_500_vichy[i,t-T]=0}
	}
}


for (t in 1:20){
	p_under_50_vichy[t]=mean(under_50_vichy[,t])
	p_under_100_vichy[t]=mean(under_100_vichy[,t])
	p_under_250_vichy[t]=mean(under_250_vichy[,t])
	p_under_500_vichy[t]=mean(under_500_vichy[,t])

}

#..............
# Graph
#..............
png(filename=str_c(here::here("img/Simulation/2023_05/3_Model_sans_distribution_melange/Threshold_"),scenario,"_",type_mod,"_2023_09_22.png"),width=800,height=800)

par(mfrow=c(1,1),mar=c(4,6.1,2,0.5),cex.lab=1.4, cex.lab=1.4)

plot(1,1,type="n",axes=FALSE,xlim=c(0.5,20.5),xlab="années",ylim=c(0,1),ylab=expression(italic(p^seuils)),cex.lab=1.5) #expression(italic(p^seuils))
# trace l'axe des ordonnées
axis(2,at = c(0,0.2,0.4,0.6,0.8,1),labels=c(0,0.2,0.4,0.6,0.8,1),cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "black")
# trace l'axe des abscisses
lab2=c(1975+T,1975+T+9,1975+T+19)
axis(1,at = c(1,10,20),
		labels=lab2,
		cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "black")

x=seq(1,20,1)
color<-ifelse(scenario=="sans_Q","blue",
              ifelse(scenario=="identique","green",
                     ifelse(scenario=="diminue_5","orange",
                            ifelse(scenario=="diminue_10","red",
                               ifelse(scenario=="augmente_5","magenta",
                                  ifelse(scenario=="augmente_10","darkorchid4",""))))))
#points(x,p_under_50_vichy_sans_Q,col="grey75",pch=16)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_50_vichy[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_50_vichy[2:20],col=color,lwd=2)

segments(x[1:19],p_under_100_vichy[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_100_vichy[2:20],col=color,lwd=2,lty=2)

segments(x[1:19],p_under_250_vichy[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_250_vichy[2:20],col=color,lwd=2,lty=3)

segments(x[1:19],p_under_500_vichy[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_500_vichy[2:20],col=color,lwd=2,lty=4)


legend("topleft",
       legend=c(expression(p^seuils < 500),expression(p^seuils < 250),expression(p^seuils < 100),expression(p^seuils < 50)),
		    lty=c(4,3,2,1),#16),
	    	col=rep(color,4), #,"grey75","grey85"),
	    	bty="n")
	#	horiz = TRUE)


dev.off()

```

```{r graph_threshold_compare_scenario_ss_distri_melange,eval=FALSE,echo=FALSE}
library(stringr)
iteration=10000
T=48
type_mod="WithoutModelMelange"

#On charge les différents N_Vichy
load(here::here("2023_05_N_vichy_Projection_WithoutStocking_Sensibilite_evolution_WithoutModelMelange_sans_Q_2023_08_31.RData"))
N_vichy_sans_Q<-N_vichy
rm(N_vichy)

under_10_vichy_sans_Q=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_50_vichy_sans_Q=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_100_vichy_sans_Q=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_250_vichy_sans_Q=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_500_vichy_sans_Q=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))

p_under_10_vichy_sans_Q=rep(NA,20)
p_under_50_vichy_sans_Q=rep(NA,20)
p_under_100_vichy_sans_Q=rep(NA,20)
p_under_250_vichy_sans_Q=rep(NA,20)
p_under_500_vichy_sans_Q=rep(NA,20)

#identique
load(here::here("2023_05_N_vichy_Projection_WithoutStocking_Sensibilite_evolution_WithoutModelMelange_identique_2023_08_31.RData"))
N_vichy_Q_identique<-N_vichy
rm(N_vichy)

under_10_vichy_Q_identique=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_50_vichy_Q_identique=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_100_vichy_Q_identique=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_250_vichy_Q_identique=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_500_vichy_Q_identique=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))

p_under_10_vichy_Q_identique=rep(NA,20)
p_under_50_vichy_Q_identique=rep(NA,20)
p_under_100_vichy_Q_identique=rep(NA,20)
p_under_250_vichy_Q_identique=rep(NA,20)
p_under_500_vichy_Q_identique=rep(NA,20)

#diminue_5
load(file = here::here("2023_05_N_vichy_Projection_WithoutStocking_Sensibilite_evolution_WithoutModelMelange_diminue_5_2023_08_31.RData"))  
N_vichy_diminue_5<-N_vichy
rm(N_vichy)

under_10_vichy_diminue_5=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_50_vichy_diminue_5=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_100_vichy_diminue_5=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_250_vichy_diminue_5=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_500_vichy_diminue_5=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))

p_under_10_vichy_diminue_5=rep(NA,20)
p_under_50_vichy_diminue_5=rep(NA,20)
p_under_100_vichy_diminue_5=rep(NA,20)
p_under_250_vichy_diminue_5=rep(NA,20)
p_under_500_vichy_diminue_5=rep(NA,20)

#diminue_10
load(file = here::here("2023_05_N_vichy_Projection_WithoutStocking_Sensibilite_evolution_WithoutModelMelange_diminue_10_2023_08_31.RData"))
N_vichy_diminue_10<-N_vichy
rm(N_vichy)

under_50_vichy_diminue_10=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_100_vichy_diminue_10=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_250_vichy_diminue_10=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_500_vichy_diminue_10=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))

p_under_50_vichy_diminue_10=rep(NA,20)
p_under_100_vichy_diminue_10=rep(NA,20)
p_under_250_vichy_diminue_10=rep(NA,20)
p_under_500_vichy_diminue_10=rep(NA,20)

#augmente_5
load(file = here::here("2023_05_N_vichy_Projection_WithoutStocking_Sensibilite_evolution_WithoutModelMelange_augmente_5_2023_09_22.RData"))  
N_vichy_augmente_5<-N_vichy
rm(N_vichy)

under_10_vichy_augmente_5=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_50_vichy_augmente_5=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_100_vichy_augmente_5=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_250_vichy_augmente_5=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_500_vichy_augmente_5=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))

p_under_10_vichy_augmente_5=rep(NA,20)
p_under_50_vichy_augmente_5=rep(NA,20)
p_under_100_vichy_augmente_5=rep(NA,20)
p_under_250_vichy_augmente_5=rep(NA,20)
p_under_500_vichy_augmente_5=rep(NA,20)

#augmente_10
load(file = here::here("2023_05_N_vichy_Projection_WithoutStocking_Sensibilite_evolution_WithoutModelMelange_augmente_10_2023_09_22.RData"))
N_vichy_augmente_10<-N_vichy
rm(N_vichy)

under_50_vichy_augmente_10=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_100_vichy_augmente_10=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_250_vichy_augmente_10=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))
under_500_vichy_augmente_10=array(NA,dim=c(iteration,20))

p_under_50_vichy_augmente_10=rep(NA,20)
p_under_100_vichy_augmente_10=rep(NA,20)
p_under_250_vichy_augmente_10=rep(NA,20)
p_under_500_vichy_augmente_10=rep(NA,20)

for (t in (T+1):(T+20)){
	
	for (i in 1:iteration){
		if(N_vichy_sans_Q[i,t] < 50){under_50_vichy_sans_Q[i,t-T]=1} else{under_50_vichy_sans_Q[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_sans_Q[i,t] < 100){under_100_vichy_sans_Q[i,t-T]=1}else{under_100_vichy_sans_Q[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_sans_Q[i,t] < 250){under_250_vichy_sans_Q[i,t-T]=1}else{under_250_vichy_sans_Q[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_sans_Q[i,t] < 500){under_500_vichy_sans_Q[i,t-T]=1}else{under_500_vichy_sans_Q[i,t-T]=0}
	  #identique
	  if(N_vichy_Q_identique[i,t] < 50){under_50_vichy_Q_identique[i,t-T]=1} else{under_50_vichy_Q_identique[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_Q_identique[i,t] < 100){under_100_vichy_Q_identique[i,t-T]=1}else{under_100_vichy_Q_identique[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_Q_identique[i,t] < 250){under_250_vichy_Q_identique[i,t-T]=1}else{under_250_vichy_Q_identique[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_Q_identique[i,t] < 500){under_500_vichy_Q_identique[i,t-T]=1}else{under_500_vichy_Q_identique[i,t-T]=0}
	  #diminue5
	 	if(N_vichy_diminue_5[i,t] < 50){under_50_vichy_diminue_5[i,t-T]=1} else{under_50_vichy_diminue_5[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_diminue_5[i,t] < 100){under_100_vichy_diminue_5[i,t-T]=1}else{under_100_vichy_diminue_5[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_diminue_5[i,t] < 250){under_250_vichy_diminue_5[i,t-T]=1}else{under_250_vichy_diminue_5[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_diminue_5[i,t] < 500){under_500_vichy_diminue_5[i,t-T]=1}else{under_500_vichy_diminue_5[i,t-T]=0}
	  #diminue10
	  if(N_vichy_diminue_10[i,t] < 50){under_50_vichy_diminue_10[i,t-T]=1} else{under_50_vichy_diminue_10[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_diminue_10[i,t] < 100){under_100_vichy_diminue_10[i,t-T]=1}else{under_100_vichy_diminue_10[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_diminue_10[i,t] < 250){under_250_vichy_diminue_10[i,t-T]=1}else{under_250_vichy_diminue_10[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_diminue_10[i,t] < 500){under_500_vichy_diminue_10[i,t-T]=1}else{under_500_vichy_diminue_10[i,t-T]=0}
	  #augmente5
	 	if(N_vichy_augmente_5[i,t] < 50){under_50_vichy_augmente_5[i,t-T]=1} else{under_50_vichy_augmente_5[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_augmente_5[i,t] < 100){under_100_vichy_augmente_5[i,t-T]=1}else{under_100_vichy_augmente_5[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_augmente_5[i,t] < 250){under_250_vichy_augmente_5[i,t-T]=1}else{under_250_vichy_augmente_5[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_augmente_5[i,t] < 500){under_500_vichy_augmente_5[i,t-T]=1}else{under_500_vichy_augmente_5[i,t-T]=0}
	  #augmente10
	  if(N_vichy_augmente_10[i,t] < 50){under_50_vichy_augmente_10[i,t-T]=1} else{under_50_vichy_augmente_10[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_augmente_10[i,t] < 100){under_100_vichy_augmente_10[i,t-T]=1}else{under_100_vichy_augmente_10[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_augmente_10[i,t] < 250){under_250_vichy_augmente_10[i,t-T]=1}else{under_250_vichy_augmente_10[i,t-T]=0}
		if(N_vichy_augmente_10[i,t] < 500){under_500_vichy_augmente_10[i,t-T]=1}else{under_500_vichy_augmente_10[i,t-T]=0}
	}
}


for (t in 1:20){
	p_under_50_vichy_sans_Q[t]=mean(under_50_vichy_sans_Q[,t])
	p_under_100_vichy_sans_Q[t]=mean(under_100_vichy_sans_Q[,t])
	p_under_250_vichy_sans_Q[t]=mean(under_250_vichy_sans_Q[,t])
	p_under_500_vichy_sans_Q[t]=mean(under_500_vichy_sans_Q[,t])
	#identique
	p_under_50_vichy_Q_identique[t]=mean(under_50_vichy_Q_identique[,t])
	p_under_100_vichy_Q_identique[t]=mean(under_100_vichy_Q_identique[,t])
	p_under_250_vichy_Q_identique[t]=mean(under_250_vichy_Q_identique[,t])
	p_under_500_vichy_Q_identique[t]=mean(under_500_vichy_Q_identique[,t])
	#diminue5
	p_under_50_vichy_diminue_5[t]=mean(under_50_vichy_diminue_5[,t])
	p_under_100_vichy_diminue_5[t]=mean(under_100_vichy_diminue_5[,t])
	p_under_250_vichy_diminue_5[t]=mean(under_250_vichy_diminue_5[,t])
	p_under_500_vichy_diminue_5[t]=mean(under_500_vichy_diminue_5[,t])
	#diminue10
	p_under_50_vichy_diminue_10[t]=mean(under_50_vichy_diminue_10[,t])
	p_under_100_vichy_diminue_10[t]=mean(under_100_vichy_diminue_10[,t])
	p_under_250_vichy_diminue_10[t]=mean(under_250_vichy_diminue_10[,t])
	p_under_500_vichy_diminue_10[t]=mean(under_500_vichy_diminue_10[,t])
	#augmente5
	p_under_50_vichy_augmente_5[t]=mean(under_50_vichy_augmente_5[,t])
	p_under_100_vichy_augmente_5[t]=mean(under_100_vichy_augmente_5[,t])
	p_under_250_vichy_augmente_5[t]=mean(under_250_vichy_augmente_5[,t])
	p_under_500_vichy_augmente_5[t]=mean(under_500_vichy_augmente_5[,t])
	#augmente10
	p_under_50_vichy_augmente_10[t]=mean(under_50_vichy_augmente_10[,t])
	p_under_100_vichy_augmente_10[t]=mean(under_100_vichy_augmente_10[,t])
	p_under_250_vichy_augmente_10[t]=mean(under_250_vichy_augmente_10[,t])
	p_under_500_vichy_augmente_10[t]=mean(under_500_vichy_augmente_10[,t])
	
}

#..............
# Graph
#..............
png(filename=str_c(here::here("img/Simulation/2023_05/3_Model_sans_distribution_melange/Threshold_50_compare_scenario"),"_",type_mod,"_2023_09_22.png"),width=800,height=800)

par(mfrow=c(1,1),mar=c(4,6.1,2,0.5),cex.lab=1.4, cex.lab=1.4)

plot(1,1,type="n",axes=FALSE,xlim=c(0.5,20.5),xlab="années",ylim=c(0,1),ylab=expression(italic(p^seuils)< 50),cex.lab=1.5) #expression(italic(p^seuils))
# trace l'axe des ordonnées
axis(2,at = c(0,0.2,0.4,0.6,0.8,1),labels=c(0,0.2,0.4,0.6,0.8,1),cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "black")
# trace l'axe des abscisses
lab2=c(1975+T,1975+T+9,1975+T+19)
axis(1,at = c(1,10,20),
		labels=lab2,
		cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "black")

x=seq(1,20,1)

#points(x,p_under_50_vichy_sans_Q,col="grey75",pch=16)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_50_vichy_sans_Q[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_50_vichy_sans_Q[2:20],col="blue",lwd=2,lty=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_50_vichy_Q_identique[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_50_vichy_Q_identique[2:20],col="green",lwd=2,lty=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_50_vichy_diminue_5[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_50_vichy_diminue_5[2:20],col="orange",lwd=2,lty=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_50_vichy_diminue_10[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_50_vichy_diminue_10[2:20],col="red",lwd=2,lty=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_50_vichy_augmente_5[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_50_vichy_augmente_5[2:20],col="magenta",lwd=2,lty=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_50_vichy_augmente_10[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_50_vichy_augmente_10[2:20],col="darkorchid4",lwd=2,lty=2)

legend("topleft",title=expression(p^seuils < 50),
       legend=c("sans_q","identique","diminue_5","diminue_10","augmente_5","augmente_10"),#,expression(p^seuils < 10)),
		    lty=c(2,2,2,2,2,2),#16),
	    	col=c("blue","green","orange","red","magenta","darkorchid4"), #,"grey75","grey85"),
	    	bty="n")
	#	horiz = TRUE)


dev.off()


png(filename=str_c(here::here("img/Simulation/2023_05/3_Model_sans_distribution_melange/Threshold_100_compare_scenario"),"_",type_mod,"_2023_09_22.png"),width=800,height=800)

par(mfrow=c(1,1),mar=c(4,6.1,2,0.5),cex.lab=1.4, cex.lab=1.4)

plot(1,1,type="n",axes=FALSE,xlim=c(0.5,20.5),xlab="années",ylim=c(0,1),ylab=expression(italic(p^seuils)< 100),cex.lab=1.5) #expression(italic(p^seuils))
# trace l'axe des ordonnées
axis(2,at = c(0,0.2,0.4,0.6,0.8,1),labels=c(0,0.2,0.4,0.6,0.8,1),cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "black")
# trace l'axe des abscisses
lab2=c(1975+T,1975+T+9,1975+T+19)
axis(1,at = c(1,10,20),
		labels=lab2,
		cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "black")

x=seq(1,20,1)
#points(x,p_under_100_vichy_sans_Q,col="grey65",pch=16)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_100_vichy_sans_Q[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_100_vichy_sans_Q[2:20],col="blue",lwd=2,lty=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_100_vichy_Q_identique[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_100_vichy_Q_identique[2:20],col="green",lwd=2,lty=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_100_vichy_diminue_5[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_100_vichy_diminue_5[2:20],col="orange",lwd=2,lty=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_100_vichy_diminue_10[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_100_vichy_diminue_10[2:20],col="red",lwd=2,lty=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_100_vichy_augmente_5[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_100_vichy_augmente_5[2:20],col="magenta",lwd=2,lty=2)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_100_vichy_augmente_10[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_100_vichy_augmente_10[2:20],col="darkorchid4",lwd=2,lty=2)

legend("topleft",title=expression(p^seuils < 100),
        legend=c("sans_q","identique","diminue_5","diminue_10","augmente_5","augmente_10"),#,expression(p^seuils < 10)),
		    lty=c(2,2,2,2,2,2),#16),
	    	col=c("blue","green","orange","red","magenta","darkorchid4"), #,"grey75","grey85"),
	    	bty="n")
	#	horiz = TRUE)


dev.off()

png(filename=str_c(here::here("img/Simulation/2023_05/3_Model_sans_distribution_melange/Threshold_250_compare_scenario"),"_",type_mod,"_2023_09_22.png"),width=800,height=800)

par(mfrow=c(1,1),mar=c(4,6.1,2,0.5),cex.lab=1.4, cex.lab=1.4)

plot(1,1,type="n",axes=FALSE,xlim=c(0.5,20.5),xlab="années",ylim=c(0,1),ylab=expression(italic(p^seuils)< 250),cex.lab=1.5) #expression(italic(p^seuils))
# trace l'axe des ordonnées
axis(2,at = c(0,0.2,0.4,0.6,0.8,1),labels=c(0,0.2,0.4,0.6,0.8,1),cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "black")
# trace l'axe des abscisses
lab2=c(1975+T,1975+T+9,1975+T+19)
axis(1,at = c(1,10,20),
		labels=lab2,
		cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "black")

x=seq(1,20,1)
#points(x,p_under_250_vichy_sans_Q,col="grey55",pch=16)
segments(x[1:19],p_under_250_vichy_sans_Q[1:19],x[2:20],p_under_250_vichy_sans_Q[2:20],col="blue",lwd=2,lty=2)
```
